name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Asking you to stand with Joe and Kamala tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm coming to you today as a fellow American with a very important question. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Hi Peter -- Gretchen here.

Trump likes to call me "that woman from Michigan," and around here I'm sometimes known as the "fix the damn roads lady" \-- but I'm coming to you today as a fellow American with a very important question.

[Before our convention begins tonight, will you pitch in a couple of bucks to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as our next President and Vice President? They need our help to defeat Donald Trump, so I hope you'll give what you can >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Do you remember what Donald Trump said when he was asked about the hundreds of thousands of American lives lost due to COVID-19?

_" It is what it is."_

**That 's what he said, Peter.**

In five words, he completely wrote off over 160,000 families who have lost loved ones to this pandemic. Those families deserve better. We, the people, deserve better from our president.

COVID-19 isn't going anywhere soon, and we need to elect a president who takes this pandemic seriously -- someone who will listen to scientists and take immediate action to help see Americans through this difficult time.

**We need to elect Joe Biden. And the only way to do that is by coming together and doing the hard work it 's going to take to reach voters in every corner of this country before Election Day.**

[That's why I'm asking you now, Peter, will you chip in to fuel the crucial work we need to do to put Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in charge? Anything you can spare will go a long way today.](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

I know Joe Biden will get to work for us on day one because he and President Obama did just that back in 2009 when they brought back our auto industry from the brink of collapse.

Joe Biden has a plan to meet the challenges we're facing as a country and not only build us back to where we used to be but build us back better.

And I know he'll get it done because he's chosen one heck of a running mate to join him in this fight.

Kamala Harris has years of experience serving her people as Attorney General of California and in the Senate since 2017. She is an advocate for change, and I know she will do a great job as our Vice President.

**But there 's one more piece to this puzzle, Peter -- us.**

We know that winning this election isn't going to be easy, and Donald Trump is going to do everything in his power to stop us. So Joe and Kamala need us -- all of us -- to step up and have their backs as they go into the final phase of this race.

[So, I've got to ask you one last time. Will you show Joe and Kamala that you have their backs in the fight against Trump by making a contribution to fuel their campaign today?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B4_whitmer_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6155/451091788/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6154/451091788/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6153/451091788/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6152/451091788/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6151/451091788/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6150/451091788/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6153/451091788/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e614f/451091788/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e6152/451091788/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b433/1cd0ac28/16622615e/357e614e/451091788/VEsFBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations?=
subject: Koch is at it again, this time in Alaska
body:
Koch and his SuperPACs have decided to attack Dr. Al Gross! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=403a06e6bc&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## **Koch Operatives Target Alaska**
---
|
---
| **Sorry to bother you tonight; however, I just got off of a conference call and it was brought to my attention that Koch and his cronies have turned their attention to Alaska with the goal of silencing our voice.** Koch operatives and their Super PAC's have plans of dumping millions of dollars into Alaska to defeat Dr. Al Gross and ensure that the status quo is maintained. We can’t let these attacks go without a response. Just a few weeks ago the Alaska race was the most important Senate race no one was talking about. Now, outside spending is funneling in from the Koch Super PAC's, and they're coming in hard.

But what Koch and his operatives don't realize is the Alaska youth will decide this election.This race will be won by the Youth of Alaska whose vote makes up 32% of all registered electorates within the state — we're here to ensure that this 2020 election cycle will be bring the largest youth voter turnout in Alaska history! We've worked too hard to get Alaska on the battleground map, now Americans for Prosperity Action and Concerned Veterans for America Action, Koch funded Super PAC's have added Dr. Al Gross to their short list of targeted toss-up races. Koch and his allies have plans to unleash a seven-figure digital ad buy in August, and are reactivating its in-person door knocking with just under 100 days until the general election. name: Team St. George
subject: Just One Day Left
body:
Friends and Supporters,Tomorrow is election day! The polls will be open from 7 am- 7pm and Team St. George will be sign waving. [**If you would like to volunteer for tomorrow, reach out to our team!**](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkkjiddl-ojijtnthh-r/) We would love to have you.We want to thank all of you for being a supporter of Dr. James St. George, it has been an honor to get to know the most important issues to voters in district 3.Please be safe and do not hesitate to reach out to our campaign team with any questions or issues you wish to see addressed. We will continue to work tirelessly to tackle prominent issues in our community. And as always, we put people over politics.**It would be an honor to have you vote for Dr. James St. George on August 18th!** Help push Dr. James St. George over the finish line!Team St. George | [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkkjiddl-ojijtnthh-y/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkkjiddl-ojijtnthh-j/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkkjiddl-ojijtnthh-t/)
---|---|---
Physician, Businessman, Community Leader, Eagle Scout, Husband, Father, Christian, NRA-rated Marksman, Conservative, Republican... These are just a few of the words to describe Dr. James St. George. For more than a decade, James has served patients at his clinics throughout north Florida and played an active role in the medical community, helping to improve healthcare services throughout our area.
[Unsubscribe](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jkkjiddl-ojijtnthh-i/)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: re: Michelle Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Michelle Obama had my favorite speech of the night. |
---
Peter,

What an incredible first day of the Democratic National Convention! I'm already so moved by so many leaders coming together to say they'll do everything they can to elect Joe and me, and Democrats up and down the ballot.

And Michelle Obama had my favorite speech of the night. Peter, I had to make sure you saw her undeniable call to action:** "If we have any hope of ending this chaos, we have got to vote for Joe Biden like our lives depend on it."**

She's absolutely right. And one way we can keep up this fight is by making sure we have the resources to run effective organizing and advertising programs in battleground states across the country.

**Peter, Joe announced our huge goal to raise $25 million before the convention ends. And based on our campaign 's internal goals across the country, we're hoping to still raise $990,000 of it from Pennsylvania. **

[**If you 're as fired up as I am right now, will you be one of the first-time donors from Pennsylvania that will help us raise $990,000 by Thursday night? If you can, make your first contribution tonight. ** ](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| [$25 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

| [$100 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

| [$250 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter, we still have three more incredible days of the convention ahead of us.

The formal roll call will confirm Joe Biden as our party's nominee for President. On Wednesday, I'm so excited to speak and humbly accept your nomination to be the next Vice President of the United States. And on Thursday, Joe will speak and officially accept the nomination as your candidate for President.

But before then, Peter, we have still have to keep up the fundraising pace.

So if you were as inspired as I was by Michelle Obama and everyone else who spoke -- Bernie Sanders, Jim Clyburn, Amy Klobuchar, and more -- I hope you'll make your first donation to power our campaign today.

[**Can you be one of the donors we need from Pennsylvania to help us raise $990,000 more before the end of the convention?**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B5_KDH-post-michelle_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Kamala
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d11/1634296731/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d10/1634296731/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0f/1634296731/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0e/1634296731/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0d/1634296731/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0c/1634296731/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0b/1634296731/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0a/1634296731/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d09/1634296731/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d08/1634296731/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0b/1634296731/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d07/1634296731/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d0a/1634296731/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b440/1cd0ac28/166533b86/357e6d06/1634296731/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Today is Election Day
body:
I would be honored to have your vote.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,
Today is Election Day!
As you fill out your ballot today, I would be honored if you would cast your vote for me.
I am the Constitutional conservative choice for Congress. That is why I have been endorsed by Senator Rand Paul, the Tea Party Express, the Tea Party Patriots, and the Republican Liberty Caucus.
If elected to Congress, I will fight for our district harder than anybody else. That is why I have more endorsements from local leaders, including Sheriff Bobby Schultz and Commissioner Gayward Hendry, than any other candidate in this race.

Why did these elected officials and organizations endorse me?
Because I am the most pro-Trump, pro-gun, pro-life, and pro-freedom candidate in this race.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U_e3hhQiJfZ1CuWlMpez37LaH_4jCJjqh6u7Go8ISA6oQJqkdo2DHunkX7t30gSczenjB2iZ8Ug3wR9CbUn3QjimRAexiyOP7GAwMlds_C-MAcmum5ntXTi_Gx6dRsHCulvQBoz6AaL7qx4MJ_r-5Ce_CIcfQT0Z&c=hZ-4Wm6AFyW1fn0Q48nybraHpl0_zaOT6T7IVKQ3pZBh-xISRPpcOw==&ch=20MsZqf8DCMxHUVfSNfhrICoKhf7z4L8aMs3nLs8IOwdKTGXcaxfbQ==)
---
| I will govern like I have run my campaign, by focussing on the issues that matter most to you. While my opponents have been busy slinging mud and trying to buy your vote, we have stayed focused on the issues that matter.
So if you are like me and are more concerned with stopping The Squad and saving our nation from socialism, then join Team Kat and vote for me today.
Thank you for your consideration.
---
|
---
|
Kat Cammack Constitutional conservative candidate for Congress, FL-03
---
| | | [Donate Today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U_e3hhQiJfZ1CuWlMpez37LaH_4jCJjqh6u7Go8ISA6oQJqkdo2DHuz1IGKvzwEW9JzmloViuYl8Vuqrz8kLPGg9pY5HFqsGHPquYXwO9w5IGUEr1naFN0fyu5V2-824KSbt587oXHCiKhvz0UsmZUTyrMMG2Lnhnoxc6yAeukw=&c=hZ-4Wm6AFyW1fn0Q48nybraHpl0_zaOT6T7IVKQ3pZBh-xISRPpcOw==&ch=20MsZqf8DCMxHUVfSNfhrICoKhf7z4L8aMs3nLs8IOwdKTGXcaxfbQ==)

clean_body: I would be honored to have your vote. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Today is Election Day! As you fill out your ballot today, I would be honored if you would cast your vote for me. I am the Constitutional conservative choice for Congress. That is why I have been endorsed by Senator Rand Paul, the Tea Party Express, the Tea Party Patriots, and the Republican Liberty Caucus. If elected to Congress, I will fight for our district harder than anybody else. That is why I have more endorsements from local leaders, including Sheriff Bobby Schultz and Commissioner Gayward Hendry, than any other candidate in this race. Why did these elected officials and organizations endorse me? Because I am the most pro-Trump, pro-gun, pro-life, and pro-freedom candidate in this race. | == | I will govern like I have run my campaign, by focussing on the issues that matter most to you. While my opponents have been busy slinging mud and trying to buy your vote, we have stayed focused on the issues that matter. So if you are like me and are more concerned with stopping The Squad and saving our nation from socialism, then join Team Kat and vote for me today. Thank you for your consideration. | | Kat Cammack Constitutional conservative candidate for Congress, FL-03 | | | == | | www.KatforCongress.com | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com powered by

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Dr. Nina Ahmad in the news - USA TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , Thank you for standing with us. The Democratic National Convention is fully underway! Last night our First Lady Michelle Obama delivered a commanding, thought provoking message to all of us. We cannot sit this election out; literally, our lives depend on it! We should all be inspired to roll up our sleeves and do better! We must perform at 2008 and 2012 numbers and save our country. The USA Today article **The Kamala Coalition: Kamala Harris inspires a new breed of political players** , featured and quoted Dr. Nina Ahmad - see below! _Nina Ahmad, a former Philadelphia deputy mayor and the Democratic nominee for Pennsylvania auditor general, is the first South Asian to be running for that office. A Bangladeshi immigrant, Ahmad said Harris represented a new way forward for the country._ _" We are a multi-racial, multi-ethnic country and she addresses the needs of the time," said Ahmad. "She has lived experience as a Black and Asian woman. After four years of what this country has gone through, we are ready for change."_ [**Whether it 's $5, $10 or $ 20.20 your support will help us to turn PA BLUE. Can I count on you to inspire others?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/hRJ-5P4i0uelPHZCy-dzHz_ElB6_KgT7Rdwdxs4xZYE=) Thank you in advance and I look forward to moving PA __forward!__ Dr. Nina
For full article USA TODAY: [https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/elections/2020/08/17/kamala-coalition-kamala-harris-inspires-new-breed-political-players/5598944002/](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/ajzbR055L1J13E_lX71MQE_cxrba_8hwHRAGCS7UMOw=)
P.S. - Come support our 2020 Democratic Ticket with me at Dr. Nina's Zoom Watch Party, details to follow, stay tuned! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/hRJ-5P4i0uelPHZCy-dzHz_ElB6_KgT7Rdwdxs4xZYE=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/B4JMq9yzS1Z0LQalMyTrK-Ne8mhdfPAAxPxBjcvqJLw=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/uzoxGJ3SFtxZZ7GWwzGm3paqwYBnbPU1YF3k_YwPsmU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/gzu82PdMZKsKBAvHxsKUIBXBEqNca8cM2nc31DIgbz4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iQgV2-jH1AV9ooAUdcJY5IqBLT_1cDPqa6LE9AfktYE=/wGotqa4OHfAurs6e2QCJKekL-gkyckB5400cjdnvVBg=?hl=en)

name: Corky Messner
subject: Some angry Dems took the stage...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/9e4e2c78dfc2da17c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Defend the President - Make an Emergency Contribution!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/18c0fe889218c1cfc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,
Did you see any of the Democratic National Convention last night? I wouldn't blame you for not tuning in for the underwhelming event.

As usual, it amounted to The Swamp's career politicians blasting President Trump for the simple act of putting America FIRST. [Fight the Dem Cash Wave!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/6ce78c13adeb8961c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Socialist Bernie Sanders continually insulted the President, while Andrew Cuomo avoided talking about his own Coronavirus response mistakes to take jabs at him too. Michelle Obama even capped the night by rambling about how her husband was a better President.

Peter, this needs to stop. I will not sit idly by as the Democrats continue to tear down President Trump, with a complete disregard for the American people.

As I've mentioned before, the Democrats are experiencing a WAVE of campaign cash, and they're using it to tear down the President and solidify their foothold here in New Hampshire.

_**[Will you make an emergency contribution right now to help me defend the President, and finally oust Jeanne Shaheen?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/6766275c21420e2bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_
[Defend Trump - DEFEAT Jeanne Shaheen >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/c2ca843a890d2072c3d6b838967d376c/33153) We are at a turning point in American politics, Peter. _**[And I'm counting on you](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/67d2d82e679e0886c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ to ensure history remembers this election as the election where we stood up to defend our shared American ideals of liberty and freedom, not giving in to Socialist theories.

For America, Corky Messner

P.S. This election is SO crucial to our future as a country. Every bit helps, _**[will you chip in today?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/2141763239bfd4ddc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/a058c88ac35dc8b9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/fb962f388570e3c7/3f048fec67909f35c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

| Dear Friend,

Our first recount has been approved and paid for in Sussex County!

With this court victory, we now have the ability to challenge the entire Republican U.S. Senate Primary Election and the:
* Over 49,000 votes scanned in, but **supposedly did not vote for President or U.S. Senate** ;

* Over 40,000 votes rejected and **not counted by the Board of Elections** ;

* Thousands of votes that were received by the Boards of Elections but **not processed, reported, or counted by the Secretary of State** ;

* Thousands of votes that were **stamped July 8th by the postal service but were handled differently** by each county;

* _**And more**_.

I will fight and we will stop this process riddled with systemic failure that was set up to ensure a Biden and Booker victory in NJ.

Today we are launching our first TV ad for the general election!

In this pandemic, we need leaders who will persevere, solve problems and get Iowans safely back to work. That's exactly what I'll do!

Check it out by clicking [HERE.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=df7aaf2b23&e=16fac31a0f)

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: F*CK, Hugo Minnesota!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=1)
---
Peter \-- "F*CK, Hugo Minnesota!" That's the phrase uttered by the next Democrat legislator from House District 67A, John Thompson, as he and other agitators stood in front of the home of Minneapolis police union chief, Bob Kroll on Saturday. "Don’t run now. Don’t run now racist white people. I’m here. Oh yeah, we pull up. We pulled the f– up,” [Thompson continued](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkLfjac_hOXOCluyVZcQGd6WAol791J3J6wmamka8qNjuorzrY2D5d9qZlgT7xRUNmHpZZfpHn7AdIITMKM65vxPhhykgOg3y_TDJ0sEOzBiPfcwjxpATFOdoOL_Jd7UwzA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=2). “Blue lives ain’t s–, and if people here don’t support black people, f– Hugo, Minnesota.” **What's happening in American political discourse right now is dangerous for the future prosperity of our country. BLM and Antifa not only are getting a pass from the mainstream media, they're being applauded by Democrats in power.** And Governor Walz is no different. Racist agitator John Thompson received Tim Walz' endorsement before last week's primary election. Now John Thompson is a lock for the November election in the heavily progressive St Paul district. You'd think Democrats across the state would rush to the microphone to condone Thompson's behavior. But there's silence from many of them, including the ones in swing districts. **Action 4 Liberty will make sure voters in those districts know what the Democrats stand for in this election!** Radicals like John Thompson and Ilhan Omar are becoming the face of the modern Democrat party. In places like Minneapolis and St Paul, there's very little we can do to stop these people from getting elected. It's the liberal zombie apocalypse! So instead, our strategy is to get principled, liberty fighters elected in conservative districts so we don't send weak-kneed, run-of-the-mill Republicans up to the Capitol as our last line of defense. Last week, Action 4 Liberty was able to help Rep Jeremy Munson win his Republican primary election against the establishment's hand picked challenger. Munson won in a landslide. **More importantly, we helped a real liberty champ Erik Mortensen cross the finish line in House District 55A. That seat is currently occupied by crazy liberal, Brad Tabke.** Tabke is one of the remaining Democrats in Republican districts who has not voted to remove Walz' emergency powers. He's really showing his true colors. Brad Tabke also has remained silent on condemning the behavior of his soon-to-be colleague in the House, John Thompson. The best way to drown out the voice of racist agitators like Thompson is by getting real liberty fighters elected. That's why races like Erik Mortensen's are so important! The stakes are huge these days. We need to End Walz' Emergency Powers and it seems more and more likely that the way to do it is at the ballot box. **Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED!**
## [HELP US STOP HIM](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=3)
It's time to build a better team of legislators at the Capitol. We can drown out the voices of radicals like John Thompson by getting a team of liberty fighters like Erik Mortensen in office. _Help Action 4 Liberty take the fight to these Democrats in swing districts. They need to continue feeling the heat all the way til November._ | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=5)
---
Let's hold these Democrats accountable and **turn up the heat** on them. We MUST do everything we can to take back our state.
**[With your support. we can prevail. Please consider helping with a $25, $50, $100 or even $250 donation today.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=6)**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Emily Cupples
subject: Day 2 Convention | 100th Anniversary of the 19th Amendment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp%20isaac%20300%20px.png]Dear Peter,
IT'S THE 100TH ANNIVERSARY OF THE 19TH AMENDMENT!
Tennessee cast the final and deciding vote to ratify the 19th amendment and in celebration The Tennessee Democratic Party will host delegations and attendees from more than 30 states for RATIFIED! A 19TH AMENDMENT CELEBRATION. During this unprecendented convention year, you can join these exclusive events. You'll hear from women leaders like Atlanta mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms, activist Lily Ledbetter, TN State Senator Raumesh Akbari, and performers Jason Isbell. Details are below and we hope you will join us for this historic event. [https://tndp.org/ratified/] All proceeds go towards efforts to elect more women and progressives this election cycle.
Today, during our delegation breakfast, we heard from Democratic leaders local and national speaking in one voice. They included working-class advocates like Ohio Senator Sherrod Brown, champions for rural America like North Dakota Senator Heidi Heitkamp, and trailblazers like Carol Moseley Braun—the first Black female Senator in U.S. history. Like Shirley Chisholm before her, Carol Moseley Braun beat a path for our first Black woman Vice President: Kamala Harris.
Building on the success of today's event, Democrats from across the state and country will join the Tennessee delegation at virtual events throughout the week. Join us for breakfast every day, celebrate the 19th amendment with us tonight, and hear from national leaders like AG Eric Holder and Andrew Yang.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/ratified-facebook-post.png]
RATIFIED! A 19TH AMENDMENT CELEBRATION - Tuesday, 8/18, 6:00 - 8:00 PM CT
Tonight, the second day of the DNC convention, marks the 100th Anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment. Led by the Democratic Party of Tennessee, the state that became the 36th to ratify the amendment on that day 100 years ago, you are invited to join a multi-state celebration of this historic milestone. This two hour event will feature speakers, musical performances, and a roll call of "The Perfect 36," the states that ratified the amendment.
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/ratified/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/304840810958080]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DNC%20BREAKFASTS%20%281%29.png]
DELEGATION BREAKFASTS: Wednesday, 8/19 - 8/20, 8:30-10:00 AM CT
Join Chair Mary Mancini and the Tennessee Delegation each morning for breakfast featuring nationally known Democratic leaders including Attorney General Eric Holder and presidential candidate Andrew Yang ,to name just a couple. Tickets are $25 per breakfast or all four for $75.
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-breakfasts/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/217274179727923/]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DOODLES-FOR-DEMOCRATS-tndp-webpage-1.png]
DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION
How can you own a one-of-a-kind piece of art AND help to elect Democrats in Tennessee? DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS! Artists, musicians, activists, writers, and politicians took a high quality heavyweight mixed media 6 x 8 inch artist board, picked up the artistic implement of their choice and doodled away. And the results have been outstanding. Visit the TNDP DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION (Live on Sunday, August 16, 2020 at 8:00 am CT). [https://tndp.org/doodles/]
VISIT THE AUCTION [https://www.betterunite.com/TNDP-tndpdoodlesfordemocrats/Auction?a=39ca3e40-18f5-4601-b47b-f22811e3bf99] | FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/events/589833798588681]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Ratified%20Facebook%20Post%20%282%29.png]
See you "at" Ratified.
Emily Cupples
Director of Communications, Tennessee Democratic Party
SUPPORT TENNSSEE CANDIDATES
The momentum built during convention is paramount and crucial to this election cycle in Tennessee as we fight to flip the state legislature. Donations made will go to direct efforts to support candidates up and down the ballot this fall. We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

| | Our race is a "must-win" for Republicans to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi.

Even President Trump believes this seat will flip, citing the rise in crime and the tax burden on New Yorkers.

| | And while Max Rose was busy joining calls to defund the police, crime has surged in our city. Max Rose said a raise in his paycheck was a ‘drop in the bucket’ and yet Staten Islanders and southern Brooklynites are struggling to make ends meet.

Max Rose’s time is up.

It’s never been more crucial we elect a new voice to Congress who will stand up for Staten Island and southern Brooklyn.

We are in every position to take back this seat, but must have the resources to compete with Nancy Pelosi’s Money Machine and the dark money pouring into Max Rose’s campaign.

[FRIEND, I know I’ve asked before and we are so close to WINNING... but I can’t do it without your support. Please chip in what you can TODAY so we stop the radical and socialist agenda that’s destroying our country. ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=258A427A1A5540)

subject: Update on the Post Office: 17 petition signatures needed from 03264
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5cf/2a380d31/233a3997/f0a413/2235393882/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Team,
Over the last few days, we've seen pictures of mailboxes piled up or locked shut. It's terrifying.
Millions of Americans -- including rural Granite Staters -- rely on timely mail for everything from paychecks and prescriptions to groceries and letters. And this year, many Americans are expected to rely on vote-by-mail to cast their ballots.
**What the Trump administration has done with the postal service is a disaster, and action needs to be taken immediately to ensure that ballots can be fairly, safely, and efficiently mailed in.**
**[Please sign our petition to make your voice heard that Congress MUST take action to address mail delivery issues and save the Postal Service.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5cf/2a380d31/233a3997/f0a41c/2235393882/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202008_USPS?source=e20200817_usps3_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Donald Trump and his hand-picked Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, continue to put politics over the well-being of the American people. We can't let them get away with it.
We need just 17 more signatures from 03264 to send a message that the Postal Service must get back up and running efficiently. [**Will you please sign, everyone?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5cf/2a380d31/233a3997/f0a41c/2235393882/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202008_USPS?source=e20200817_usps3_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking action!
Team Maggie

| |

| | Analysts are starting to catch on to what you and I already knew: **we can win this election.**

For too long, this district has been written off as a Republican seat that we shouldn't bother trying to flip. But in 2020? **This seat is no longer safe for Republicans.**

[Click here to donate and help us flip this red seat blue. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=22c8fad9a1&e=140a9b81e7)

A new report from Inside Elections [placed us on a list of House races to watch](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=27556c22cb&e=140a9b81e7), as the evidence mounts that once-safe GOP strongholds are now in play. We know that we have the momentum and that with you behind our campaign, we can finish the job this November.

My opponent, a pro-Trump conservative, can see the writing on the wall, too. **He knows his seat is up for grabs, and he's called on his rich donors to help bail him out this cycle. **

But he can keep his corporate donors. I don't need them, I've got you. **You've been with me from the beginning and you've helped this campaign go from a longshot to a race to watch.** I need your support again, to help us finish this race strong and come out on top. [Click here to chip in and make a difference down the stretch. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0b8635c218&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: James Taylor
subject: Want to meet me and some fellow Democrats for the convention this week?
body:
I'm looking forward to sharing with you all what this election, and what being an active part in our country's democracy, means to me. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
Peter --

Last night, Democrats across the country gathered for the first night of the Democratic National Convention.

We come together united, as Democrats and as Americans, for the most important election of our lifetimes. My wife, Kim, and I are doing everything in our power to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and I hope you will join us, Peter.

[**That 's why I am honored to be a part of Grassroots Fest.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

**Across the next several days, join the Biden Victory Fund and Democrats across the country for events with your Democratic ticket, their families, and a few special guests. Chip in $25 or more to access every event in Grassroots Fest, or pick out tickets to buy individually here:**
**GRASSROOTS FEST**
**Tuesday, August 18:** Joe Biden and Tom Hanks
**Thursday, August 20:** Doug Emhoff and James Taylor
**Friday, August 21:** Joe Biden, Jill Biden, Kamala Harris, and Doug Emhoff
---

[BUY TICKETS](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
I'm looking forward to sharing with you all what this election, and what being an active part in our country's democracy, means to me.

And this year we have a ticket we can truly be excited about. Joe Biden is a kind and decent man who understands the concept of public service. He and his wife Jill will bring strong values and compassion back to the White House.

And with Kamala Harris we have a historic candidacy and a fierce champion for families everywhere. I can't wait to sit down with her husband, Doug, and talk about the huge opportunity we have to send these two proven fighters for the people to the White House.

Peter, I hope you'll join us and come to a few, or all, of these events.

We need you, all of you, staying engaged and powering this campaign -- with your donations, with your commitment, and with your belief in what we can do together as a party and as a nation.

**Click below to get your tickets and thanks in advance for your donations. This campaign truly would not be possible without your support.**
[BUY TICKETS](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
All my best,

James Taylor

_James Taylor is a multiple Grammy award-winning singer and songwriter. He has been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and Songwriters Hall of Fame and is the recipient of the National Medal of Arts and the Presidential Medal of Freedom. James Taylor supports Joe Biden for President._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e6976/4126526845/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e6975/4126526845/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e6974/4126526845/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e6973/4126526845/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e6972/4126526845/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e696d/4126526845/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e6967/4126526845/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b44e/1cd0ac28/16787b0e5/357e696d/4126526845/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Swing State Watch (via MJ Hegar)
subject: The BIGGEST 2020 battleground 🌟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texas has a real choice ahead.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e3d/7f51f7bc/431f5eaf/4ef7e581/3146644365/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e3d/7f51f7bc/431f5eaf/4ef7e580/3146644365/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200818.1nd__1931__&amount=10")
---
**It 's a HUGE deal that Texas is now a battleground state, Peter** but polls mean nothing unless we act. We have a choice:

**Option one:**
We do everything in our power to elect MJ to the Senate, defeat Sen. Cornyn, and kick Mitch McConnell out of his office. With a new Senate majority, we can finally expand health care coverage, combat climate change, protect our communities from gun violence, and ensure that our veterans get the care they deserve. It'll be a tough fight but _so worth it._

**Option two:**
We don't give it our all. Maybe we don't pay attention, maybe we think we'll donate later. Sen. Cornyn sails to re-election, McConnell retains control, and the people of Texas are left to wonder "what if?" Instead of progress, we watch the incompetence continue in Washington.

**What 'll it be, Peter? Option one or option two? Don't end up wondering "what if?" Leave it all on the field! Help us win Texas, elect MJ, and show that _this is our year!_**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Ethan Gruber
subject: Polling shows our race is tied!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, I wanted to let you know the good news right away... _We got our polling back_ , and guess what?! It confirms exactly what we knew-- if the people of State Senate District 18 hear Betsy's message, _**we win.**_ _****_ Here's a quick rundown of what we know based on the poll:
* At this point in the race, we're in a statistical tie with our opponent.
* After voters know just a bit about both candidates, we move up quickly and are absolutely tied with our opponent.
* Once voters learn more about Betsy and her opponent, she wins by a LOT!
* In a gerrymandered District Trump won by 17, he's currently only 6 points ahead of Joe Biden-a **huge** swing in the right direction!

The tides have shifted dramatically and this is great news. It shows that everything you hear about the suburbs and Ohio is true! We can win here and change the course of history. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CySQSDSac2p_c6R6zQCwWOcYQYIzvIDxUlJSpHvL6No=/Gec6ITxMQuD1LELKs01Cy41-5eiEJGLd43MvChO7wFs=?refcode=poll1) **But this means the pressure is on** \- we only win when we communicate. We need your help in a big way because (unlike our opponent) we don't take corporate PAC money and the COVID pandemic has made it harder than ever to do grassroots campaigning. **[_If you and each of our other key supporters chip in $20 today, we can reach our voters and flip this seat._](https://act.myngp.com/el/CySQSDSac2p_c6R6zQCwWOcYQYIzvIDxUlJSpHvL6No=/Gec6ITxMQuD1LELKs01Cy41-5eiEJGLd43MvChO7wFs=?refcode=poll1&amount=20)** Click the buttons below to make a donation today. clean_body: | | | | Peter, I wanted to let you know the good news right away... We got our polling back , and guess what?! It confirms exactly what we knew-- if the people of State Senate District 18 hear Betsy's message, we win. ** Here's a quick rundown of what we know based on the poll: At this point in the race, we're in a statistical tie with our opponent. After voters know just a bit about both candidates, we move up quickly and are absolutely tied with our opponent. Once voters learn more about Betsy and her opponent, she wins by a LOT! In a gerrymandered District Trump won by 17, he's currently only 6 points ahead of Joe Biden-a huge swing in the right direction! The tides have shifted dramatically and this is great news. It shows that everything you hear about the suburbs and Ohio is true! We can win here and change the course of history. But this means the pressure is on \- we only win when we communicate. We need your help in a big way because (unlike our opponent) we don't take corporate PAC money and the COVID pandemic has made it harder than ever to do grassroots campaigning. Click the buttons below to make a donation today. Thanks so much for your support and helping us get to this point. Democracy is on the line and we can save it with people like you on our team! Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e800/77d4c309/2177ab63/263602a7/1543260814/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

"" | | "" "" "" "" "" "" My very best, Gabby Giffords | "" "" "" Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, "" Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, "" We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, "" We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support! 7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132 info@eastmanforcongress.com | | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

Please join Join James Carville, President Clinton's Campaign Manager and Political Pundit in support of Governor Carney's re-election campaign for a virtual event.

Thursday, August 27, 2020
6:00 - 7:00 p.m.
Via Zoom
Login information will be sent to RSVPs week-of event

Suggested Contribution Levels: $1200 * $600 * $300

You can RSVP online by using this link: www.johncarney.org/carville or you can contact our campaign office by phone, 302-395-0707, or email, rsvp@johncarney.org.

Checks should be made payable to Friends For John Carney and mailed to:
Friends for John Carney, P.O. Box 2162, Wilmington, DE 19899

Team Carney

The Friends for John Carney Campaign may accept contributions from individuals, corporations, labor organizations, partnerships, and other entities up to $1,200 per election period. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Only individuals who are American citizens or permanent resident aliens that reside in the United States may contribute. In addition, only corporations who are incorporated in the United States, who utilize U.S. proceeds for the contribution, and for which the decision to contribute was made by an American citizen or permanent resident alien may contribute.

Contributions from corporations, companies, organizations, incorporated or unincorporated associations, general or limited partnerships, or other entities that contribute must:
- Include the full names and mailing addresses of all individuals who own a legal or equitable interest of 50% or greater in that entity, or notify us that no such person exists (the entity’s contribution is allocated pro-rata to identified persons, subject to limits);
-Include a responsible party if the aggregate amount of contributions during the election period exceeds $100; and
-Include the following form: http://elections.delaware.gov/pubs/cf_corporate_contribution_notice.pdf.

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: 100 years today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/November%202%202020%20Deadline%20to%20hand-deliver%20Absentee%20Ballot%20to%20County%20Clerks%20office.PNG]

Fellow Democrat,

100 years ago today the 19th Amendment was ratified giving women the right to vote. Today we celebrate and honor the women before us who organized, rallied, and took action into their own hands to move women forward.

Today women and others still face unnecessary obstacles that stand in the way of exercising their right to vote. One of those obstacles is Donald Trump. Donald Trump and the Republican Party are doing EVERYTHING they can to make it harder for us to vote. They know we’re fed up.

On November 3rd, and using absentee and early voting, women must lead the way to remove Donald Trump and Republican leaders here in West Virginia from office.

Please be sure to visit govotewv.com to request your ballot and find additional information for the general election.

Sincerely,

Belinda Biafore, WVDP Chairwoman

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Dear Mitch McConnell,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
The longer you wait to help the American public, the longer we'll have to deal with the inevitable consequences.
✎ SIGN YOUR NAME to demand Mitch McConnell pass the HEROES Act ✎

Dear Mitch McConnell,

The longer you wait to help the American public, the longer we'll have to deal with the inevitable consequences.

That's why I'm demanding that you allow the Senate to vote on the HEROES Act, which would provide emergency funding for millions of struggling Americans and businesses.

Two years ago, you did not waste any time passing massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans.

Today, millions of working people are on the brink of eviction. These folks cannot afford for you to waste any more time.

Now, is the time to show up for the working people who are the backbone of this country. Now, is the time to pass the HEROES Act.

Sincerely,

-- Congresswoman Linda Sánchez

Will you sign on in support of my letter to Mitch McConnell?

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: sabotaging democracy by knee-capping the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| Major Trump donor and now Postmaster General Louis DeJoy's new policy changes at the postal service are part of a calculated effort to slow down the delivery of our mail.

In addition to slashing overtime and reducing capacity by removing mail sorting machines from facilities around the country, DeJoy is considering additional changes that would increase costs and make it more difficult for states to distribute absentee ballots.

We cannot and will not stand by while Donald Trump and his enablers engage in a blatant attempt to politically "knee-cap" the postal service for the purpose of undermining the credibility of vote counts in our upcoming election -- or for any other purpose at all.

[**_Sign here to demand Congressional Republicans support Democratic efforts to protect our postal service from political sabotage!_**](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916dd/70cdc2ba/45b179b6/3913761/3000087013/VEsH/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/usps?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Sign+here+to+demand+Congressional+Republ&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2&source=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2") [ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916dd/70cdc2ba/45b179b6/391377e/3000087013/VEsE/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/usps?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2&source=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2") This is not a Blue or Red issue. Americans across the country rely on the postal service, and that is even more true during this historic pandemic.

With case-counts rising across the country, not only will seniors and veterans be unable to get life-saving medications they rely on, but ongoing mail delays threaten millions of Americans who receive their Social Security benefit checks through the mail and service delays will make it more difficult for states to distribute absentee ballots.

What is happening is nothing less than an open attack on our democracy in the middle of a pandemic -- one that has been made significantly worse because of Trump's failure to act and listen to medical experts.

[**_Add your name here to stand against Trump's attack on the postal service and American democracy and demand your right to vote safely in November!_**](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916dd/70cdc2ba/45b179b6/391377f/3000087013/VEsF/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/usps?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+here+to+stand+against+Trum&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2&source=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2")

Chris

---
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
---

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

[Click here](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916dd/70cdc2ba/45b179b6/391377c/3000087013/VEsC/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-footer-2020?amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2&source=CVH_EM_EN_EXPANDED_200818_1_2") to donate.

In addition to slashing overtime and reducing capacity by removing mail sorting machines from facilities around the country, DeJoy is considering additional changes that would increase costs and make it more difficult for states to distribute absentee ballots. We cannot and will not stand by while Donald Trump and his enablers engage in a blatant attempt to politically "knee-cap" the postal service for the purpose of undermining the credibility of vote counts in our upcoming election -- or for any other purpose at all. "" "" This is not a Blue or Red issue. Americans across the country rely on the postal service, and that is even more true during this historic pandemic. With case-counts rising across the country, not only will seniors and veterans be unable to get life-saving medications they rely on, but ongoing mail delays threaten millions of Americans who receive their Social Security benefit checks through the mail and service delays will make it more difficult for states to distribute absentee ballots. What is happening is nothing less than an open attack on our democracy in the middle of a pandemic -- one that has been made significantly worse because of Trump's failure to act and listen to medical experts. "" Chris Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 Kensington, MD 20895 "" to donate. "" to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump to Pardon Susan B. Anthony Over 1872 Voting Arrest
body:
President Trump said he will pardon Susan B. Anthony, the leader of the women’s suffrage movement who was arrested for violating male-only voting laws | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6dfcb1a6c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_Trump to Pardon Susan B. Anthony Over 1872 Voting Arrest_**

“President Trump said he will pardon Susan B. Anthony, the leader of the women’s suffrage movement who was arrested for violating male-only voting laws in 1872,” Mark Moore reports.

“The pardon comes 100 years to the day after the 19th Amendment, which ensured women’s right to vote, was ratified.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8118eb9954&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [**“Like America, half of Trump’s staff are women”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2776b7dece&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Americans have a keen sense for political stunts, and the ACLU's push to dismantle DHS is as close as it gets. To be clear: The ACLU sees violence on our streets and its first instinct is to criticize law enforcement and call for the dismantling of the very institution established to protect the homeland, the American people and our values,” Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf writes in [_Newsweek_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=181391a849&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump recently took a monumental step toward permanently plugging gaps in the medical supply chain that became evident during the COVID-19 pandemic. The ‘Buy American’ executive order that he signed will ensure that other nations cannot have the opportunity to deny us life-saving products in a time of need,” Dr. Nina Radcliffe writes in [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=384c056f0f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “More than five dozen 911 calls went unanswered by local police in Portland as authorities worked to control a riot that broke out overnight Saturday . . . Call types ranged from theft, vandalism, suspicious activity, hazards, hit and run, burglary, violation of restraining order, alarms, stolen cars, harassment and many others,” Dominick Mastrangelo reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1b5c309ad&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e44b7c4ac&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89593607b9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3e7dc594ea)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
