name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: Joe, Jill, Kamala, Doug, Tom Hanks, James Taylor, and more
body:
Be a part of important conversations with the Democratic ticket, their families, and some exciting special guests |
---
Peter,

Democrats across the country will have a unique opportunity this year to be a part of the Democratic National Convention over the next three days.

We'll be hosting grassroots fundraisers over the next few days that you can access from your home, and be a part of important conversations with the Democratic ticket, their families, and some exciting special guests.

[Check out our exciting events and get your tickets here if you haven't already. ](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | **GRASSROOTS FEST**
**Tuesday, August 18:** Joe Biden and Tom Hanks
**Thursday, August 20:** Doug Emhoff and James Taylor
**Friday, August 21:** Joe Biden, Jill Biden, Kamala Harris, and Doug Emhoff
---

[BUY TICKETS](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Grassroots fundraisers like these have been critical to our success over the past few months, as we have gathered together to hear from President Obama, Pete Buttigieg, Elizabeth Warren, and Kamala Harris the day after she was named Joe Biden's running mate.

These events have allowed us to adapt to this new virtual way of campaigning while raising the money we need to be competitive with Donald Trump.

Over 97% of our donations come from grassroots supporters, and grassroots fundraisers are a huge part of that, Peter.

[So we hope you'll consider getting tickets for as many of these events as possible this week and we'll see you online >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
[BUY TICKETS](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.18_B1_grassrootsfest2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Biden-Harris 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7207/4232693984/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7206/4232693984/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7205/4232693984/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7204/4232693984/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7203/4232693984/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7202/4232693984/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7201/4232693984/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b490/1cd0ac28/167bba788/357e7202/4232693984/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Kathy Manning
subject: RSVP Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Join us in supporting Chief Justice Cheri Beasley!
|
---

| | Good afternoon, I hope you will join me in supporting Chief Justice Cheri Beasley by attending an event we are co-hosting for her on Monday, August 24th at 6:00 PM. Chief Justice Beasley has proven herself to be a remarkable jurist who is non-partisan, fair-minded, and has led the court ably through this pandemic.
As the first African-American woman to lead our North Carolina Supreme Court, Chief Justice Beasley brings her unique life experience as well as many years as a public defender, district court judge and court of appeals judge, to the bench.
[**We were proud to see Chief Justice Beasley featured in an article in the New York Times about the need for criminal justice reform.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d287/3d199a51/2fac7bd1/7364b404/2506850789/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/06/16/opinion/state-supreme-courts-racial-justice.html?searchResultPosition=1") Chief Justice Beasley's re-election is critically important, as the leader of the North Carolina Supreme Court she sets the tone of the court and serves as an example to the other Justices. We need her leadership during these difficult times. We look forward to seeing you on August 24th! Sincerely, Kathy [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d287/3d199a51/2fac7bd1/7364b405/2506850789/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://www.chiefjusticebeasley.com/aug24")
[**Click here to RSVP.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d287/3d199a51/2fac7bd1/7364b405/2506850789/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://www.chiefjusticebeasley.com/aug24") **For more information contact Sean@KathyManningForNC.com** |
---

| | We have some big news: **Our Weekend of Action event starts this Friday the 21st!** We're thrilled to be getting on the phones and talking to voters about why we need Dani Brzozowski as our next representative-- it's so important that we keep up the energy and enthusiasm as we head into the final stretch of the campaign. Our campaign will be hosting virtual phone banks to turn out voters from now until November. This means that no matter where you live,**** you can help get Dani elected to Congress without leaving your couch. **_We need to hit our goal of 50 people _**signing up for shifts this weekend in order to be on track for this month. We're counting on you to help change the course of IL-16th with your voice during our Weekend of Action. Sign up for your shifts by clicking the button below, and we look forward to working with you! ×

clean_body: Friday the 21st-Sunday the 23rd will be a major event for our campaign, and we want you to be a part of it! | | | | | | | We have some big news: Our Weekend of Action event starts this Friday the 21st! We're thrilled to be getting on the phones and talking to voters about why we need Dani Brzozowski as our next representative-- it's so important that we keep up the energy and enthusiasm as we head into the final stretch of the campaign. Our campaign will be hosting virtual phone banks to turn out voters from now until November. This means that no matter where you live,** you can help get Dani elected to Congress without leaving your couch. We need to hit our goal of 50 people signing up for shifts this weekend in order to be on track for this month. We're counting on you to help change the course of IL-16th with your voice during our Weekend of Action. Sign up for your shifts by clicking the button below, and we look forward to working with you! × | "Sign Up!" | Nicholas Pigeon Deputy Field Director Dani for Illinois × | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: got a second?
body:
I’ll keep this short and sweet, but I have an important question to ask. Will you endorse me and pledge to support my campaign from now until... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/how-we-flip-the-house-2088398?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=0c2ab0e68f&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2d3d1c176a&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friend,

I’ll keep this short and sweet, but I have an important question to ask.
[Will you endorse me and pledge to support my campaign from now until Election Day?](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=d6e54e4f45&e=f1831b4ca2)

I know it’s a lot to ask, but the stakes are incredibly high in 2020 and I’m going to need the support of every single member of my grassroots community to win in November and send my opponent packing.

It’s not going to be easy — my opponent knows he’s vulnerable and he won’t take anything for granted. He’s got a massive war chest and even though we’re catching up, he is still outraising us.

I know I can win on November 3rd, but I can’t do it alone.

Can I count on you to endorse me and donate to support my campaign? Use the link below.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088398/endorse-nancy/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9b57e49b91&e=f1831b4ca2)

Thank you for everything you do — your endorsement and support mean the world to me.

Sincerely,

Nancy Mace P.S. if you want to endorse me and support my campaign, please use this safe and secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088398/](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=db506b2edd&e=f1831b4ca2)

body:
Friend, Nick is the best candidate to represent our district in Congress. The biggest difference between Nick and our opponent is that Nick will NOT sell our district to win Pelosi’s favor. name: John Kasich
subject: My Convention Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Mine is just one voice of many calling for change, but you can be assured that I will be doing everything in my power to fight for our country. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpBrGX6lFn7_9gw9o036_wLVjhEuCmP6sqYevsQquycJNog1WWkGlAMf-1XzyJSLe4W9ugrSkj7ZBsZq78it9RkslJjwteuX481293sW1cC983VixDNj_2sSqSF9NPIBP0VS90LkKt-8xrzTAFcC8tWys_3n83Yi4cu4X_RUpvTaqqCYFGohPyfpik14znbnoIhtMOBBuQiCVDDOnXiUxAkNbDjaJa7YYBUmumS7K0KEchzKLlr70yzwNNR32XIibhA%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - it's not every day that you get attacked on the far-right by Trump and on the far-left by Cong. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC).

**But something tells me I'm exactly where I need to be with the message that I shared** as part of the Democratic National Convention Monday evening. In case you missed it, [you can watch my speech here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpJSFhLpilXdOgfCIWI3jG--cagsSmzzaMh2iw4ut3OtZT-s7mAJjSqe1SZ72imPkIE2FpskrAX1Ojvter2UHOF6eFCNNwRjbucrpu2hqMwP-1dUyTdgV5apji855HXcvyEUS2smVqPmdc1dZsZAzZls4vvFNenvZTmIcn5Vtt9W8q0-_oEwFy_FgYi9NXAIHmrgbFt4lk-yEHM0mw3FNbJe8sGqkXPmTksbQq4-YWPFPVvSKofNTvluLI5ZX3D5KDeA37wWq6ND3XqfDmLYLmRQc-j3iAiq1kwOWEAHAnW7m).
[Watch Speech Here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpJSFhLpilXdOgfCIWI3jG--cagsSmzzaMh2iw4ut3OtZT-s7mAJjSqe1SZ72imPkIE2FpskrAX1Ojvter2UHOF4euaRt-XGW-UK_49H7czvlK3I9kMW30ZWffmQRmvm2D7wPFmDHab0pzd-FTUVO--PWRqMzX7p8SpbmxmdGOW4cxnXrtA6ML3qcYYbLDJ_H7SodcGVc41vIAR0QuedV3uU2t5zFy42BcX1i7iNc3fGadAjDiCAIt4hsgGU8Lq6rrIvb0Vm6maDNW8tznLuFyerPgZrByuNeLRiiRIDYzq4Y)
|
---
We received a lot of new signups on our website this week and I wanted to thank you for taking the time to join our effort and to learn more about how we can work together to heal our country.

I have been calling for a healing in America for a long time now and you can be assured that I will be doing everything in my power to fight for a better future for our country. We really are all in this together. If you're interested in making a contribution to support this effort, [you can do so here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpCODM7ujwMTdmYqRabbU2Sm1QxTjamyoVc43GtfR3Z4UlAO5c-dJ1LSqLKexxJs8jThA4ulkyAD5Lv5drvmqva1XeoMksRUHs6u7zFeXVCitDGHY2pmC-cbvS6Qac57Ec4yYQ_XAAsO4D3aaSaU2Fcbksub8bTPWTEPDypVojgrA26SuSBO0ql4S2tLvp_ClyHoeaV4JgB8HnIBGkGU_JyhaOw_3gOYx5mb6BrQe2TEb_NGLZclgrpUDcXthskFZxg%3D%3D).

Also - please feel free to share my speech on [Facebook](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpDc9oMKvIQmMsyYmTdByDZTqcjKF-ynP1dEafO3Utotmh0Y4YO8x50N25MMypi4utSXMkRpHjjvBtILf8CbmRCGHUH4-sm5wDeCA9P6Ejl1KxlvsYpR1VyrmzTSMRKTTM8jgpTkiHKDZkcADv1sqZKOCjQ2K55L64ypFmPREBc0U2U6z2yBlI30Jl_27eRVDbC_RCz_MnTsjD-cHK5oJSGFghLvXWzMtgwrTuytT63bs8JISMj7PIRi8noci8P2byG6K7dj75zK2Mg7KwgfZOAf6z9lnXGtkV4XUgMYLw4BP), [Instagram](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpHXd8U2d-HLYANtE-rzzGYRbT5s4uPipafdzeLNEHL-XJjYhCjaWoZwbuAS7Wej_nBSwUN_aTUGv1n0jUh004NpLh0ZZoLg8m1gu8Rh6wNN6e3_YmPNYRUspRxIzfb4zTllDuQhgRqyUAtwqkgXosxAWUrFuluax62tTme8u28iPMtPRZJAZj2j8PVcv8akm87tRbO0Khgazp106rtKtAsgd1dBi_erNMZmO4wUfRUOFYxWdb_jGyQmCybQilW79hZbAtqvLZF-DLR8qljvOLBw%3D) or [Twitter](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=59a1bb5c05614db6844d6caec1d61571&_e=LwDFv8XAAVh4qtoq_PHWpJSFhLpilXdOgfCIWI3jG--cagsSmzzaMh2iw4ut3OtZT-s7mAJjSqe1SZ72imPkIE2FpskrAX1Ojvter2UHOF63fatIo3uN2eaLO9Yj8I_urXFVG5ugk1xMEF83zBX_5Iburd7AXh5idLFjrDiwqPD7CEM7tc2cXcLXXjx0uwU7OP4YsLXALfVpxX0yC4NOg1C8cfZElQjB48zpfiQBGqy_Mjh3azkrwoh8JmeV2UmSDkBYeZE6yliszBz8LH9XxHSkqZ0BaN_N_VmHHshMzIBJ3nwatoPE7dp6I_lE2Sov) if you have others who may want to see it. clean_body: Mine is just one voice of many calling for change, but you can be assured that I will be doing everything in my power to fight for our country. | | Peter - it's not every day that you get attacked on the far-right by Trump and on the far-left by Cong. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC). But something tells me I'm exactly where I need to be with the message that I shared as part of the Democratic National Convention Monday evening. In case you missed it, . | We received a lot of new signups on our website this week and I wanted to thank you for taking the time to join our effort and to learn more about how we can work together to heal our country. I have been calling for a healing in America for a long time now and you can be assured that I will be doing everything in my power to fight for a better future for our country. We really are all in this together. If you're interested in making a contribution to support this effort, . Also - please feel free to share my speech on , or if you have others who may want to see it. Thank you for all that you're doing to help! -John | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- P.S. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Announces Healthcare Advisory Board
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Hunt for Congress Announces Healthcare Advisory Board

Today, 50 medical professionals from Houston and Texas' 7th Congressional
District announced their support for Houston native and combat veteran Wesley
Hunt. Husband to a nurse practitioner at Texas Children's Hospital, Wesley Hunt
is committed to working with Houston medical professionals to bring healthcare
solutions to residents in the 7th District.

The healthcare advisory board brings voices from across the medical community
in Houston and is committed to helping Wesley win Texas' 7th Congressional
District in November.

* * *
_Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18743203/238344087/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWE1Y2JkMy04ZWUxLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2QUXDHHehtHxiJfuEgDKWx_k2ZCE3LcIWU-pfAHYeQ=&emci=b7f49d22-89e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=0aa5cbd3-8ee1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18743204/238344088/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.18_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWE1Y2JkMy04ZWUxLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2QUXDHHehtHxiJfuEgDKWx_k2ZCE3LcIWU-pfAHYeQ=)

subject: Democrats are trying to buy our Senate Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Peter, I want to bring something to your attention. Today is Primary Day in Alaska, and Senator Dan Sullivan has a tough race ahead of him. Democrats are trying to buy our Senate Majority right before our very eyes – and they’re succeeding. Chip in to help defend Dan’s seat and our Republican Senate Majority >> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjkxMDgS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgyMTQ3MTk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

We need your help now more than ever if we’re going to protect Dan, Alaska, and our Republican Senate Majority from the Democrats and ultra-left dark money groups. We need to post big fundraising numbers before midnight, so that they know Dan means business. Donate now to help Senator Sullivan! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjkxMDgS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgyMTQ3MTk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

If we lose just four seats, then we lose our Republican Senate Majority. Liberal dark money groups are standing by to pump millions of dollars into Alaska. We have to stand by Dan and fight back against them.

Make a donation before midnight tonight to help Senator Sullivan fight back! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjkxMDgS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgyMTQ3MTk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 We CANNOT lose the Senate! Peter, your support will have a HUGE impact on this election.
Thank you,
Mitch McConnell Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Speaking to Swing State Conservatives About Trump’s Covid Failures
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTE8oP9iovmjAb1xC9-KHrfHW6C33FLVYQr0yrVrlS7VwLCj90PqITenDwuJexGhspF1WU7M-QYWN2Z1Mh8Pxcd-18sT6yDbOXV-5r00eAyDXqy7bRQKxPQKuMFyKpX4MZ_ClKVqXDIRo041AcDzbB8jkVDkeT9oi6m-g2-Nby-UZlRkOlHcO2HOOuOC5qkChTjOtbPwna78E5CnQ5ZgdUaw/34f/TICCP9FsTrCRWua3u5Y0rw/h0/GPqcxpetUfT_Iw7Ujzfd23mX1KOfLpqU7ZlUTV-0CcY) Team — It’s 77 days out and we’re following Trump and Pence on the campaign trail with their Covid failures.

Our analysis shows Trump’s disastrous Coronavirus response is the lone breaking point for swathes of Trump supporters who align with him on nearly every other issue.

These conservatives and moderates, like most people, are more receptive to messages delivered by those they are already inclined to agree with. With that reality in mind, our Covid Safe Communities campaign will promote content created by conservatives who voice concerns about the Coronavirus, contradict Trump’s COVID-19 claims, or are generally critical of his handling of the pandemic.

Content like this from the conservative wife of a Pennsylvania police officer:
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkcPjLLVesWu2G3QOU7Pr3QOdQNQFGGYGUiPYJE-cKwCqPh_OL_HcQ3TqXcXeeyMkXGi3ewfZEF3V-FYX8_jITIoBh9soqDK6Y9krNXssUDrTJ_aBYIn7oG6RRRkL8ho87bowDPWTDGGFcfqKZRDqV1XjFvByiPDIrx34nkA1Z5oqsgL9fAyl1l5fG61jbSG03256szGuOb1gAyNI1C4N4vFgtOnLjCfGSh7enDlB-0rQN02M1-pkk2sLU3DbhXOoktnCDQJdt8Coo1KxpeoExUZMvon4SwZ5RSTqbKOCY66gLvWZsHA4ehxcac30xOSwskMBlU1_rtzhCgeGGneufhFLYxgnkf2tTPEmjPsKqNItZaekNTVSeyW9aMtxiCkd4Q/34f/TICCP9FsTrCRWua3u5Y0rw/h1/x9wtLdKCW8AFD-E-0niwNMi4uSoC_W_JtO4mLGP_amU) We’ll promote this content in the social feeds of conservatives while Trump or Pence are in their community spreading lies. On Thursday, when Trump is speaking in Old Forge, PA, we’ll be there too. Speaking to moderates and conservatives through paid targeted social media about his failures and the risk he poses to the community.

Thank you for being a part of the fight. You’re a key member of this team and an integral component in the success of campaigns like this. More soon.

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money. We know times are tough right now, but, if you can, [**chip in $5 to make sure Trump is a one-term president and competent leaders can start repairing the mess that he’s made.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkcPjLLVesWu2G3QOU7Pr3QOdQNQFGGYGUiPYJE-cKwCqs6JOU_nShktOxZnnQ2yPGSJOkpcBlQ5C1kBChCDjHfIdRBD7FTf09D4RU9rPpxrILxxY01h32sq7bqJAPUHnjIGd0LMRXoXPU4ahGoqkS66V3dHztaOK7-wMJfC3mpGsGb4Q6XdWSotNBLo40LaiJFOwqrPB6J760xFnZEqzzPmLiQPL2xJHtWUONePeiNXel1qDsh7qHQ0v1P1F90TBdN44gLhc-c6YoF3rzFhmW579FfT_GASD_TwYvD8dWV4SI_IdKOfKUVZkLSFgwACZcC4pLtWSHYQ4-2EnMB4hOJ6vUssvadT6hYv8NORyNcTV1k3w9gBlmngJRNG_6G76Xw/34f/TICCP9FsTrCRWua3u5Y0rw/h2/baZdwPnno_YIbfgmNhRrsMjLptaB-ob9cXRoNkncJoI)

name: Margaret Good
subject: only a few hours left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ll get right to the point.
Hi friend,

I’ll get right to the point. I’m reaching out to you one last time to ask for your help just hours before the biggest fundraising deadline our campaign has faced thus far.

As we head into the General Election period, we need to be in the strongest position possible to take on Vern Buchanan and the corporate interests backing his campaign. Operatives from Vern’s campaign will be poring over our fundraising numbers -- let’s show them what they’re up against -- **the power of the people.**

Please, can you make your first investment in our campaign before tonight’s critical FEC Primary Election deadline? Use this secure link right now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18744436/238373782/1073285021?refcode2=e26e1dce-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=4fdfa5c0-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=e26e1dce-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=081720-es-fec-primary-deadline-5-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjZlMWRjZS05OWUxLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=da6GtZQangeY7Js9pBz_GK4xX6tW_pC63pmf0mprDAA=)**

The people of the Suncoast deserve a representative who will bring accountability to Washington, deliver common sense solutions to the problems we face every day, and above all else, someone who they can count on to get things done. I will work my heart out to represent you and stand up for our shared values, but I can only do that if I win this election.

Now, let’s show Vern and his corporate backers what they’re up against! Together, we are far more powerful than his special interests!

Thank you!

— Margaret

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18744437/238373783/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjZlMWRjZS05OWUxLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=da6GtZQangeY7Js9pBz_GK4xX6tW_pC63pmf0mprDAA=)**
If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18744438/238373784/-1805212762?refcode=081720-es-fec-primary-deadline-5-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjZlMWRjZS05OWUxLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=da6GtZQangeY7Js9pBz_GK4xX6tW_pC63pmf0mprDAA=&emci=4fdfa5c0-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=e26e1dce-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)**
If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4fdfa5c0-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/e26e1dce-99e1-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjZlMWRjZS05OWUxLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=da6GtZQangeY7Js9pBz_GK4xX6tW_pC63pmf0mprDAA=&id=113801977) .

body:
Thank you for supporting Matt Mowers as we fight to take our New Hampshire values to Congress. [ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=1979e111af404bfcb349d8fa63376f2a&_e=1yvwrKZAzrA5iU0Ueq8UptoD9fKZLCSTmSsNkCgH2Dbf1LU1YrppO__BDKYF7tyeYihsbhq6ujAUkLeWcFNG_3eheU3y3_f1J4tQ569yhWLpiAiylYq-eNMDGg1WbTx3leA-E3R0N6blGIHxWYeP69QCRJFk_50VoHkyURuqfO-1CKsHM73OjyE5eeFxgn4HlBv_FqCsSbqwQgL9DL39Ia7b8c9UFjdjfaU55jYWNnrFlvOraE84h4QDvITXzigJg969TAYHAley5n9OhtcMJ-1vvlOfxNFh-1crakFwlP6ieXOVc5JvOeLCMhNd_nkriCwtXIwC-DGKjTzRKZZZ6s8HfRGVurRmrHK7mhkZhK0ijM_3O57fJ9Vh1iMiquHUP5CQcHquWR_0wWUQck8p4w%3D%3D) | |

Welcome to the team, friend! We’re excited to have you.

Thank you for supporting Matt Mowers as we fight to take our New Hampshire values to Congress.

Matt is a proud MAGA Republican, and he is determined to defeat Chris Pappas in November. In Congress, he’ll work with President Trump on the issues most important to you.

We like to keep our supporters updated, and we’ll be in touch through email. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Doug Jones' speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
My friend Senator Doug Jones spoke last night at the Democratic National Convention.
Doug is locked in a tight race for re-election in Alabama -- and he needs all of us to stand with him if he's going to beat the GOP and help us win a Democratic Senate majority this year.
[**Can you rush in a $5 contribution to stand with Doug Jones in this must-win fight?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d93fd/4fbb2af3/214aeb8b/5e804afe/2566070053/VEsH/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-doug-jones-2020?source=em200817i_4564")
Mitch McConnell and the GOP are eyeing Doug's seat in Alabama because they think this is their best shot to remove a Democratic incumbent in their fight to keep the Senate majority.
And with President Trump's attacks on the postal service in an attempt to suppress the vote in November, standing with our Democratic candidates like Doug is more crucial than ever before.
**[**We can 't lose this fight, . Pitch in $5 to support Doug Jones now.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d93fd/4fbb2af3/214aeb8b/5e804afe/2566070053/VEsE/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-doug-jones-2020?source=em200817i_4564")**
Thank you,
Jacky

clean_body: Team, My friend Senator Doug Jones spoke last night at the Democratic National Convention. Doug is locked in a tight race for re-election in Alabama -- and he needs all of us to stand with him if he's going to beat the GOP and help us win a Democratic Senate majority this year. "" Mitch McConnell and the GOP are eyeing Doug's seat in Alabama because they think this is their best shot to remove a Democratic incumbent in their fight to keep the Senate majority. And with President Trump's attacks on the postal service in an attempt to suppress the vote in November, standing with our Democratic candidates like Doug is more crucial than ever before. "" Thank you, Jacky ** ""**

body:

| Friends --

As a former NASA astronaut who has been to space four times and as an engineer by training, I make decisions based on science and facts.

**Here are the facts:**
* My Republican opponent outraised us and polling shows this is one of the tightest races in the entire country.
* Mitch McConnell went up with new attack ads against us the second we cleared the primary and is reportedly planning to spend an additional $21 million this month alone to protect his majority.
* McConnell and my opponent have the resources to keep attack ads up against me from now until Election Day.

Here's one more fact: [When you split a donation today between my campaign and 314 Action toward our critical mid-quarter deadline, you ensure my team has the resources we need to respond to these attacks and win this race.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6752/4bd7760e/526973c9/77a8afa7/3304792575/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_kelly_aug20_split?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+When+you+split+a+donation+today+between+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200818_6MC-6MO-1MNTL_none_STD_1_kellysplit&source=314_EM_FR_200818_6MC-6MO-1MNTL_none_STD_1_kellysplit&refcode=314_EM_FR_200818_6MC-6MO-1MNTL_none_STD_1_kellysplit")

It's going to take all of us pitching in, digging deep, and getting involved to counter McConnell's spending, my opponent's attacks, and continue reaching out to the undecided voters and swing voters that will decide control of this race and control of the Senate.

Thank you again for all of your support.

Mark

Peter,

As the race tightens, **Sen. Cornyn 's DC bosses are getting more and more nervous about his chances.** They've seen how MJ started out over ten points behind but has closed the gap to **just one point!**

So now Sen. Cornyn's handlers are about to start shoveling money into this race to bail out their puppet. Mitch McConnell, the Koch network, Ted Cruz, Donald Trump, Jr. -- they're trying **_everything_** to keep their guy in the Senate.

We need to fight back against their ads and their money, and that means counting on you -- our grassroots army -- to pitch in, fight back, close the gap, and FLIP THE SENATE this November!

**Will you stand up to Sen. Cornyn 's DC bosses, Peter?**

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Re: Michelle Obama
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
What a speech! |
---
Friend,

I don't know about you, but I'd been looking forward to Michelle Obama's speech all week. And she sure did remind us all why she is so loved, admired, and appreciated.

Michelle's speech called on Americans to remember the values of decency, compassion, and respect that can still unite us while succinctly exposing Donald Trump as the fraud, failure, and fool that he is.

But there was one passage that meant even more to those of us in Georgia:

> _We've got to vote early, in person if we can. We've got to request our mail-in ballots right now, tonight, and send them back immediately and follow up to make sure they're received. And then, make sure our friends and families do the same._
Friend, we can't allow Donald Trump and the GOP to stop us from raising our voices and participating in democracy. The answer isn't panic. It's planning. Like Michelle said, we have to make a plan to vote early in person or request our absentee ballots straight away.

**Here in Georgia, we're on the frontline in the fight against voter suppression. My team is building a juggernaut ballot access program to mobilize and protect voters so every eligible Georgian can vote this fall.**

_But friend, I need your help._

**[Can you chip in $20 TODAY to our Voter Protection Fund to support our efforts to make these critical investments in defense of voting rights so we can win in November?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e257f/5b2c1286/3f3c83fd/25f1a95a/1574352333/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_18_vpf_mo&amount=20")**

This week's Democratic National Convention marks the start of the final stretch before November's election -- the most consequential election of our lifetime.

The work we do in the next 76 days will determine whether or not we take back control of not only the White House, but take back the Senate, expand our House majority, flip state houses, and elect local leaders.

**This team has big plans to get to work and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, all across the country this November -- but those plans are only possible with the support of a grassroots movement.**

[If it makes sense for your budget, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can right now to help power our organizing work and help elect Democrats like Elizabeth all across the country this November?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852504e/45c30650/1c2a47f1a/66e83534/2155276028/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTA3Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA4MThfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU07F_EGR_GRM_D_20200818_V1S3_P")

If you're fired up and ready to get more involved, your donation today would help accomplish three critical missions:
1. Help elect more Democratic candidates this November who share our vision for big, structural change and support bold reform as a response to the coronavirus crisis.

2. Help power the fight at the federal, state, and local level by organizing together to push for the solutions we need right now and for bold, popular grassroots economic and government reform in the months to come.

3. Mobilize grassroots supporters to ensure Elizabeth remains a powerful national voice.

We have huge goals for these final months -- because it's going to take a tremendous amount of work to make sure we leave nothing on the table on November 3.

**But in order to reach those goals, it's going to take a grassroots movement fueled by strong grassroots supporters.**

[If you're able to, please make a contribution today to help elect Warren Democrats across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852504e/45c30650/1c2a47f1a/66e83534/2155276028/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTA3Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA4MThfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU07F_EGR_GRM_D_20200818_V1S3_P")

clean_body: The work we do in the next 76 days will determine whether or not we take back control of not only the White House, but take back the Senate, expand our House majority, flip state houses, and elect loc | | | "" This week's Democratic National Convention marks the start of the final stretch before November's election -- the most consequential election of our lifetime. The work we do in the next 76 days will determine whether or not we take back control of not only the White House, but take back the Senate, expand our House majority, flip state houses, and elect local leaders. This team has big plans to get to work and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, all across the country this November -- but those plans are only possible with the support of a grassroots movement. "" If you're fired up and ready to get more involved, your donation today would help accomplish three critical missions: 1. Help elect more Democratic candidates this November who share our vision for big, structural change and support bold reform as a response to the coronavirus crisis. 2. Help power the fight at the federal, state, and local level by organizing together to push for the solutions we need right now and for bold, popular grassroots economic and government reform in the months to come. 3. Mobilize grassroots supporters to ensure Elizabeth remains a powerful national voice. We have huge goals for these final months -- because it's going to take a tremendous amount of work to make sure we leave nothing on the table on November 3. But in order to reach those goals, it's going to take a grassroots movement fueled by strong grassroots supporters. "" Thanks for everything, Warren Democrats | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: John Kerry
subject: Let me tell you something before my speech tonight, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Before I speak at the Convention tonight, let me tell you why I'm so proud to support my friend Joe Biden. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B2_KerryConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B2_KerryConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter, before I speak at the Convention tonight, let me tell you why I'm so proud to support my friend Joe Biden, and why [I hope you'll chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help make him the next President of the United States.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B2_KerryConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B2_KerryConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

It's not because I've known Joe for so long -- it's because I know Joe so well.

I know that **in this time of crisis for our democracy, our country desperately needs a leader like Joe Biden.** We need a President who is ready on day one to begin the hard work of putting back together the pieces of what Donald Trump has smashed apart. And I know from experience: that's Joe.

Joe Biden can repair our relationships with our allies, and stand up to the strongmen on the global stage who threaten our safety and security.

Joe Biden can undo the catastrophic damage that Trump has done to our economy and build it back better than ever, starting with a commitment to rebuild our middle class.

Joe Biden can navigate the COVID-19 crisis, and elevate the voices of scientists, public health experts, and first responders.

He's done all of this before, and he's ready to do it again if elected. But he can't do it by himself, Peter -- **we all need to fight alongside Joe, like we 've never fought before.**

So tonight, I'll tell the world that I'm ready to fight like hell to make sure that Joe Biden beats Donald Trump on Election Day. [Peter, can I count on you to join me by donating to Joe's campaign today?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B2_KerryConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B2_KerryConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

John Kerry
68th Secretary of State
Former U.S. Senator from Massachusetts
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c3a/1342261365/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c39/1342261365/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c38/1342261365/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c37/1342261365/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c36/1342261365/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c35/1342261365/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c34/1342261365/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c33/1342261365/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c32/1342261365/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c31/1342261365/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c34/1342261365/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c30/1342261365/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c33/1342261365/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b4b0/1cd0ac28/167e5f1c4/357e7c2f/1342261365/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

| | Hey —

I’m sure you’ve heard that President Trump is trying to stop us from having a fair and safe election in November. He has repeatedly said he will not fund the Postal Service and instead will just let it fail — leaving millions of Americans without the ability to send in their ballots.

The House was called back in session this week to vote on a bill to protect the USPS, and we’re asking for your help to ensure this legislation passes.

We need as many voices as possible to rise up and protect the Postal Service. [**Can you add your name to our petition right now to call on Congress and Rep. Loudermilk to protect the USPS?**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=d0b86a32be&e=e25784ff28) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME ⇨](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=912f5430a7&e=e25784ff28)**

| In this year's primary, in our district, **over 61% of voters voted by mail-in ballot or participated in early voting,** but because Barry Loudermilk usually falls in lockstep with Trump, he has done nothing to advocate for us and protect the institution that so many Georgians rely on.

That’s not acceptable. We need a representative who puts people and democracy over party. That’s why I’m running for Congress.

[**In the meantime, we all need to do our part to save the USPS, which means calling on Congress to pass legislation to fund and protect it. Can you add your name right now to take a stand?**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=3737f04bcf&e=e25784ff28)

Thanks for acting on this,

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: re: did you see Eric’s speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb just addressed Indiana on the issues of equity and inclusion, and we wanted to make sure you got a chance to see what he had to say. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5fd631a2ac884b9794a31669c6fab279&_e=jnkJmW4UspBt4vkOYOcXvvlYKtyUzOFfTtN7FijrKDwoqgSZgDyw95tIJa-ZDYAJkkLuXSA_R2V_mgAPJlDJKZjQJ7Le9p8JdZ9yfZ2pOKOqYk_Crz_vhNJhPmsq-s8tcHTZNQrVqki1E2K4uP1I4THiX9Jy2jy_ZYg8gdI4yLDd9F1waeX8LAKvfthahKZBgrJE_HfdmZmkpZDRHdKVilAFLdbPnYleh3bL-CQcYnlQ6N-flIW52BWFYzrsuMRt4Isla4e_kw2bjRyxe0e3S0LCF-Qd-K8s4X9eZCjwTn2Fg5MvjzLD71s-9ERmiU9wLkS272ZYLIzDLtYdLXracTKpVdUOIVaaPyiS1P23Jd8nUy_7Ztbantt-M1BvBzm3PbUXV0Tpgph0frYSrcULNa4QTx_7Qyzgf6RYJU6hkYOb06No0nDWtJTd1gh1Mhbzjdir3yL4qemFSpSyLbmFxQ%3D%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Did you get a chance to watch Eric’s speech?

He just addressed Indiana on the issues of equity and inclusion, and we wanted to make sure you got a chance to see what he had to say.
_**“What I’ve laid out today are the first steps in a broad effort to make sure Indiana is a place where every Hoosier has an equal opportunity to achieve our founders’ vision of ‘Life, Liberty and that pursuit of Happiness.’” – Governor Holcomb**_
Eric delivered a thoughtful, open, and groundbreaking speech on his vision for making historic progress together on so many critical issues - criminal justice reform, education and workforce development, transparency, health care and more.

After months of speaking with Black leaders and stakeholders statewide – including business owners, college presidents, law enforcement, corporate executives, church leaders, and everyday citizens – he laid out a plan that addresses the root causes of inequity and takes action to promote equality, inclusion, and opportunity for all.

You can watch the full speech **[here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5fd631a2ac884b9794a31669c6fab279&_e=jnkJmW4UspBt4vkOYOcXvgbop9btFszlMswTAQwYPA7JKyMGdym8bzxHIWPWQsX56C5Fb_So1HHR-sEZKWDomJCVVKTA9_XaA9LwugVtNCI8PtvQ3SgHvtKB7G0Jt1cABNNb2HElAgrQpEIVYWtNJWWhMiiM9-eBfIRXRvjbK9xGt1NROvAAIL0hTSpE45kNbGFPRVZro91DK6jMOwy5EV-wfVbjYAf41Wg_EqU6iU124jtj0iX6i6EUAqyuRWTUcNSWWPATdkYrvVef11c133uEbIPJIuD4fhgUN3HxNSkaFsuedbujAD4LQh3NbLkGnnDTLqV-tWvrw8ZRVz7IrfvLgFamvNWM75cCDhSRupXK8U6tcHBsTPw_36PiCWfiIxjUw9xfMbhVgm_VP7e08rIKtppL5OzhXjuooglTrr7PlCWdANJCfx8sKi1ktwhwMaMKIYPn-cuxvFdCZx10GZF_0HhiXJdrvrNteixeVv-ROBnhVvM8JDViygX8vlYb)**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5fd631a2ac884b9794a31669c6fab279&_e=jnkJmW4UspBt4vkOYOcXvgbop9btFszlMswTAQwYPA7JKyMGdym8bzxHIWPWQsX56C5Fb_So1HHR-sEZKWDomJCVVKTA9_XaA9LwugVtNCI8PtvQ3SgHvtKB7G0Jt1cABNNb2HElAgrQpEIVYWtNJWWhMiiM9-eBfIRXRvjbK9xGt1NROvAAIL0hTSpE45kNbGFPRVZro91DK6jMOwy5EV-wfVbjYAf41Wg_EqU6iU124jtj0iX6i6EUAqyuRWTUcNSWWPATdkYrvVef11c13262o6umF3EzJb-oT4Pmb5UNrbjg0vTeJZgSQeKJI3edk4jA2XUt_ID649Is5YxaJJVVAgOlcXLwOZr0IMk4QiaEKFDCHywBSwsa02iMDsiyHKnuh7rs2NFB9uPuKXkShczlnu8DJUJ7m2T811G3_JLgAbapQVifPOEtfM-DCvLhG9C1HKy1NQVhJXhDd0r-L-nWkdI95qLvxCsvDx2K3Q9aDZFdx_MoGkUAJEEftzW-)
We had our crew pull together the biggest takeaways from his speech — please check them out below.

**Modernizing Policing & Criminal Justice Reform**

_**“If you want change, don’t throw a brick; use a brick to lay a foundation for something better.” – Gov. Holcomb**_
1. Governor Holcomb’s first priority is the protection of our citizens AND our officers.
2. Indiana is increasing minority representation among police officers, and it will work to modernize training and work with the legislature on criminal justice reforms.
3. To protect our citizens and officers, Governor Holcomb is mandating body cameras for every frontline state trooper by Spring 2021.
4. To modernize officer training, Governor Holcomb is directing a 3rd-party, top-down review of our state police and law enforcement academy curriculum and training, including use of force, de-escalation training, and implicit bias training.
5. Governor Holcomb will work with the legislature to add more civilian representation to the Indiana Law Enforcement Academy (ILEA) board.
6. Governor Holcomb will continue working with members of the legislature, judiciary and prosecutors on ideas that can be brought forward during the 2021 legislative session to collaborate on sentencing reform, earned credit time, jail overcrowding and exorbitant fees.

**Promoting Economic Opportunity Through Education & Workforce Development**

**“I believe that the surest path to equal opportunity is with an high-quality education.” – Gov. Holcomb**
1. Black students have lower high school graduation rates and lower college enrollment.
Governor Holcomb will direct Indiana’s new Secretary of Education to make one of their first tasks to look at actions that can be taken immediately to improve minority teacher recruitment, learning gaps and other areas to bridge the divide.
2. State leaders will submit specific recommendations on how the state may adjust policies for all our workforce programs to create greater opportunity for people of color.

**Reforming State Government**
1. Governor Holcomb will appoint Indiana’s first-ever Chief Equity, Inclusion and Opportunity Officer who will report directly to him as a member of his cabinet.
2. This person will focus solely on improving equity, inclusion and opportunity across all state government operations as well as drive systemic change to remove hurdles in the government workplace and services we provide.

_**In short, this new Cabinet member will help every state agency raise their game.**_

**Increasing Transparency**
1. As Governor Holcomb said, we’re putting “our cards on the table, face up.” Indiana’s Management Performance Hub will create a Public Disparity Data Portal to show the state’s progress on these issues.
2. The portal will track information on Pre-K enrollment; graduation, college enrollment and employment rates; access to capital; Healthy Indiana Plan enrollment; foster care placement rates; incarceration and recidivism rates, etc.

**And, of course, this isn’t a new topic. We’re already taking action on many important issues facing Black Hoosiers:**
1. Minority representation among graduates of the Indiana Law Enforcement Academy has increased from 14% to 28% between 2016 and 2019.
2. Indiana’s infant mortality rate, which disproportionately affects many Black mothers and children, is at its lowest rate since 2012.
3. Governor Holcomb set a goal for Indiana’s infant mortality rate to be the best lowest in the Midwest by 2024.
4. He launched Indiana’s OB Navigator program that helps mothers and babies in Indiana’s highest-risk areas get the care they need.
5. Next Level Jobs provides free job training to help Hoosiers skill-up for high-wage, in-demand jobs, and has now helped more than 10,000 Hoosiers. Governor Holcomb added an additional $50 million to bolster career training this year.

Please take some time to watch Governor Holcomb’s full speech, and if you can, share it with your friends, family and contacts.

[**You can also read the full speech here.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5fd631a2ac884b9794a31669c6fab279&_e=jnkJmW4UspBt4vkOYOcXviafTAMteHiTc_pEuDM4IvZVyx1vA46at95CtD4HKXWxyDT9dWCltwiRxuIQa2LRFqAEAxxgSA5m5c-CxS6PVkoxpZvO8gilEDD1WMx_GPxDLtpNmwk9k4HWo0GYrK5oawN5p21XqFMz8AGm-cThNPHIi54NRWsH-lNT_Vd4HkMVbDpYlsQ-6-HkgCcLs1QxmRsUJqy2gJYZ3sn2y6ezT9DuOnJvx9NphyxQaB1kG1JDLia9Zk_b_X3rIdG69paCDRg3475A7V0O4R3F3c5lBIXVrgsW6XQHyFWbXP7mCXuxWdy0SlDx2G2m4mtsLTHy6swo9Z9UoFPo7wDJJbxUQz5hqHVtls_vnScOGVwwjL2_YoRcMljln2W02cRl9UD4rVxoEsOAUJQstEzrbT6JBBkyPCx84LX_P3D1_qbu9fmxZReFJUdj4TWO5s_ahFawGg%3D%3D)

Thank you for reading,

-Holcomb Crew

|

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Download CRUSH COVID
body:
Your Rhode Island News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I want to remind you how important it is to download the [Crush COVID app](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001___0jVUoM8YgzNmjAcZSJLL1CiauSdPTURLQ0-SoLq-q1lh93kYU30s-ShoE2bmu10gwJqfv6G_aJFqZvTOyXtuq1MOUAJgmN3R3-M8L-jfdf8bE8PTURuG7vxz8RWwOazDkeQBgnL9poVJgt5Q5leiQyoRMdDoX&c=r8z0S-rOFDnuq_tcw7LKcA1C3IwEPZzKcNmAJcLBaJUxQK9OL7vVWw==&ch=v5LoO9j1jiAdWw2MB4WCBf9k82D9I9lhyX_FciMH_U_6zd_8BxJzfw==) in the [Apple App Store](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001___0jVUoM8YgzNmjAcZSJLL1CiauSdPTURLQ0-SoLq-q1lh93kYU37gX3KzIdQ4sZL9WqkXuCqw9KtBSY9kPdWaa1n2l94NwpPCtGAZ6SWgkVZ8tWFpApmihKwy5rKbT_lRbyVvtyOA9tpqb_uhy7-QhIvlBT0YEFsNcs8H-XxVPr0U019Bj80QfeUw7wtCfQR0Ay5AWcgWwDQz-mnHkbQ==&c=r8z0S-rOFDnuq_tcw7LKcA1C3IwEPZzKcNmAJcLBaJUxQK9OL7vVWw==&ch=v5LoO9j1jiAdWw2MB4WCBf9k82D9I9lhyX_FciMH_U_6zd_8BxJzfw==) or [Google Play](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001___0jVUoM8YgzNmjAcZSJLL1CiauSdPTURLQ0-SoLq-q1lh93kYU37gX3KzIdQ4szHfTsRdlbM4-sr9pT_eTpuZbf3nxmIEh5hvDUVt7shAUqzSECWjjNb1_E5WoSJTZ0nnAZFZFXjV8UfshSOnB4SZvnP4avx0w88UlFU0MKaSGdPZhBwbGkQqQ9Hj4dL1vwXrnnYpHTYFkAJVKCaY7OA==&c=r8z0S-rOFDnuq_tcw7LKcA1C3IwEPZzKcNmAJcLBaJUxQK9OL7vVWw==&ch=v5LoO9j1jiAdWw2MB4WCBf9k82D9I9lhyX_FciMH_U_6zd_8BxJzfw==) so that we can effectively track the spread of COVID-19 in Rhode Island.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001___0jVUoM8YgzNmjAcZSJLL1CiauSdPTURLQ0-SoLq-q1lh93kYU33esgvpLbzjMm9neE3lrYVzE6Romaw-VjPiflzoKB9CUm6vjqdTSaVA6KfOPpLdmF39vcicIyNrwhjfB9iNR1DXoo6Yx1ejutPmbyNKyb_CI-QAXd7T4BZVRzWLTqXGsSow1rlBnRl1uW5dPzxss-94=&c=r8z0S-rOFDnuq_tcw7LKcA1C3IwEPZzKcNmAJcLBaJUxQK9OL7vVWw==&ch=v5LoO9j1jiAdWw2MB4WCBf9k82D9I9lhyX_FciMH_U_6zd_8BxJzfw==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001___0jVUoM8YgzNmjAcZSJLL1CiauSdPTURLQ0-SoLq-q1lh93kYU33esgvpLbzjMm9neE3lrYVzE6Romaw-VjPiflzoKB9CUm6vjqdTSaVA6KfOPpLdmF39vcicIyNrwhjfB9iNR1DXoo6Yx1ejutPmbyNKyb_CI-QAXd7T4BZVRzWLTqXGsSow1rlBnRl1uW5dPzxss-94=&c=r8z0S-rOFDnuq_tcw7LKcA1C3IwEPZzKcNmAJcLBaJUxQK9OL7vVWw==&ch=v5LoO9j1jiAdWw2MB4WCBf9k82D9I9lhyX_FciMH_U_6zd_8BxJzfw==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
|
---
| Information: CRUSH COVID RI will connect you to the latest COVID-19 news. You can watch our press conferences, learn more about our plans to reopen the economy and get the latest data and public health information about the virus.
---
|
---
| Resources: We know that those in quarantine and isolation may need help getting food delivered or finding a safe place to stay. Our veterans and seniors may need an extra hand. And all Rhode Islanders may need mental and behavioral health support during this crisis. This app can help by connecting you with the assistance you need to stay safe and healthy during this crisis.
---
|
---
| Testing: If you ever need a test for yourself, CRUSH COVID RI lays out our testing options clearly so that you can find the option that fits your needs. We also connect you directly with our Self-Checker Tool to help you understand your personal risk and whether you should get tested.
---
|
---
| Symptom Checker: One of the main features of the app is our Symptom Checker. It's a quick, 10 second survey that asks you to self-report any symptoms you have. It then asks for your zip code so the Rhode Island Department of Health can see if there are any growing hotspots or if there are specific parts of the state where we need to expand access to testing.
---
|
---
| Location Diary: The app includes a completely optional Location Diary. If you choose to use it, the app will create a map of the places you visit for 10 minutes or more. You can also take notes in your Location Diary of the people you were with. That data is stored on your phone only and automatically deletes after 20 days. It is only available to you--unless you get coronavirus and give specific consent to share your data with the Rhode Island Department of Health. If you choose to share it, your data will be stored anonymously and will only be connected to you by a case investigator at the Rhode Island Department of Health.
---
| Downloading Crush COVID is--and will always be--completely optional. Even if you download it, no one is going to make you turn on the Location Diary feature. You can use the app without it and continue with your manual contact tracing journal. Even if you do use the Location Diary, no one is going to make you share it with the Department of Health if you get sick. These decisions are all up to you. If you don't have the app, that's OK. But you'll need to make sure you're regularly updating your manual contact journal. Crush COVID RI was designed to make the contact tracing process less stressful for Rhode Islanders, and more accurate. We all have so much going on--it's easy to forget where we've been or who we were with. I hope that this can make your life a little bit easier during this time.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001___0jVUoM8YgzNmjAcZSJLL1CiauSdPTURLQ0-SoLq-q1lh93kYU3w7W_pJcdJ9MultVG6Mh3SBpVeDywEqczyCPcN46ASJtmY17sSkcMvsDUdhDFN7n5gWTkTYO7Y3CCDUx-Zr_GTBWNrS9JduPmhpBPZ3qjCIF4YSvvCoWj2DGrPwFe-zKEC2zkYF4GFFOjvG1IsDcCdj6h0oEqUZWxq-MwlFlQa-wU-mRAwhVTAcoV80ZDBK1rr28dMGZEFQr1wcN_i-jNJLgJu0CYKa8dMrM3axumy6nctHAO_g1Hcloj_miZb3GJxKA-KtZ5-BN2uKuks3JD-M=&c=r8z0S-rOFDnuq_tcw7LKcA1C3IwEPZzKcNmAJcLBaJUxQK9OL7vVWw==&ch=v5LoO9j1jiAdWw2MB4WCBf9k82D9I9lhyX_FciMH_U_6zd_8BxJzfw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=2be34b37-cd67-48c1-b402-85d4c8c5892b)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=2be34b37-cd67-48c1-b402-85d4c8c5892b) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President and First Lady celebrate 100 years of women’s voting rights!
body:
One hundred years ago today, the 19th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution was ratified, granting American women the right to vote. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eda0718eff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 18, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: President and First Lady celebrate 100 years of women’s voting rights!**

**One hundred years ago** today, the 19th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution was ratified, granting American women the right to vote.

🎬 [**President Trump: “A monumental victory” for equality and justice!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ae2cc92ae&e=3ee4985eea)

**The President** and First Lady Melania Trump honored the occasion at the White House this morning, where President Trump signed an official Proclamation on the anniversary. It reads, in part:
| | _Today, as we celebrate a major step forward for our Nation, we pay tribute to the countless women, known and unknown, throughout our history who struggled for equality. In doing so, we recommit to ensuring our Constitution is faithfully upheld so that all Americans can pursue their dreams and fulfill their God-given potential._ |
---|---|---

**Since that historic day,** Americans have continued the work of creating a more just and equal society. President Trump is committed to building on these accomplishments.

**Last June, the President** and his national security team released a Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security to increase the political participation of women both at home and abroad. This strategy recognizes that women’s participation in resolving conflict and ending violent extremism can set the course toward a more peaceful world.

**In December, President Trump** signed legislation to provide 12 weeks of paid parental leave for Federal employees. Since his first day in office, he’s called on Congress to pass a nationwide paid family leave program to complement it.

**These ****and other investments** in working families are already paying off. Before Coronavirus struck, women’s unemployment in the United States reached its lowest level in 65 years. As of 2019, women filled _71 percent_ of all new jobs in the United States.

🎬 [**President Trump announces pardon for Susan B. Anthony’s 1872 arrest**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8f1e86ae1&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Today, a record-breaking** 131 women are serving in Congress. Nearly 70 million women vote in elections. Fifty-six percent of our Nation's college students are women. More than 11 million women own successful businesses,” President Trump said.

**“In other words** , women dominate the United States.”

[**__****WATCH: President Trump’s full remarks at today’s ceremony**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=287028307d&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 **Read the Proclamation:** [**100th Anniversary of the 19th Amendment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a5016652b&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **President Trump** **visits Iowa after derecho**

**The President** signed a Major Disaster Declaration yesterday that orders Federal assistance for Iowa following last week’s severe storms. Today, the President joined a Disaster Recovery briefing in Cedar Rapids to share more about what’s being done.

**One million residents** were affected by damage to 332 cell towers during the storms. Winds of up to 112 miles per hour swept over half of Iowa’s counties, and up to 43 percent of the state’s corn and soybean crops were damaged or destroyed.

**“We’re offering** the full support of the Federal Government,” President Trump said.

🎬 [**President Trump updates Americans about relief efforts in Iowa**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f2824f28d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump signs a Proclamation on the 100th Anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment** | August 18, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b671008950&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=49f614910c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=aea47735de)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: 🚨 The Senate is on vacation! 🚨

body:
David Perdue should be at work during this crisis. |
---
Friend,

In the midst of a public health and economic disaster, is Sen. David Perdue in Washington, hard at work for the people of Georgia?

**No. David Perdue is lounging on his private island and doing pay-to-play virtual appearances with donors.**

_All the while, COVID-19 cases are still surging, expanded unemployment benefits have expired, Americans are facing eviction and foreclosure, and schools are starting up again for the fall._

Yet Perdue and the Senate went on recess last week without securing aid for Americans and Georgians in need.

Now, after public pressure, Senate Republicans say they will introduce a "skinny" relief bill -- _which still cuts unemployment benefits and doesn't do nearly enough to provide necessary relief to millions of struggling Americans or the Postal Service_.

**David Perdue should be AT WORK actually solving these problems, NOT ON VACATION while his GOP colleagues reluctantly propose half-measures.**

We can get this under control. The Democratic-led House has been at the negotiating table for months. But we actually need Senators who will do their job and put the people first.

**Perdue and the Senate must return to work NOW to pass a relief bill and provide necessary funding for the USPS! Georgia needs emergency support more than Senator David Perdue needs another vacation.[Make a donation right now to elect Jon Ossoff to the Senate and kick David Perdue out of office.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2576/5b2c1286/3f2092f4/25f1b3ac/1261488266/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_16_recess?refcode=em_2020_08_18_recess_k")**

This is the worst public health crisis in a century.

**Nevertheless, Mitch McConnell has sent the Senate home for summer holidays. They are on recess until September 8! My opponent, David Perdue, is free to lounge on his private island while COVID-19 spreads among the people unabated.**

Instead of confronting this emergency with the honesty and seriousness necessary to protect American lives, David Perdue has mindlessly parroted the President's endless denials and misinformation -- all while lining his own pockets.

Other countries have largely contained the virus. While Senator Perdue and the GOP told us not to worry about it, they let it spread like wildfire and kill Americans at a massive scale.

**The U.S. House of Representatives passed a coronavirus relief bill THREE MONTHS AGO (!!!), but McConnell, Perdue, and the rest of the Republicans in the Senate refused to put it up for a vote or negotiate in good faith.**

**Now, David Perdue and his Senate colleagues are going home instead of passing a bill to protect the lives and livelihoods of the American people they are sworn to serve.**

_They just gave up._

Georgians deserve better.

America deserves better.

**We simply can't afford another six years of David Perdue and Mitch McConnell in power.**

clean_body: David Perdue should be at work during this crisis. | Friend, In the midst of a public health and economic disaster, is Sen. David Perdue in Washington, hard at work for the people of Georgia? No. David Perdue is lounging on his private island and doing pay-to-play virtual appearances with donors. All the while, COVID-19 cases are still surging, expanded unemployment benefits have expired, Americans are facing eviction and foreclosure, and schools are starting up again for the fall. Yet Perdue and the Senate went on recess last week without securing aid for Americans and Georgians in need. Now, after public pressure, Senate Republicans say they will introduce a "skinny" relief bill -- which still cuts unemployment benefits and doesn't do nearly enough to provide necessary relief to millions of struggling Americans or the Postal Service. David Perdue should be AT WORK actually solving these problems, NOT ON VACATION while his GOP colleagues reluctantly propose half-measures. We can get this under control. The Democratic-led House has been at the negotiating table for months. But we actually need Senators who will do their job and put the people first. Perdue and the Senate must return to work NOW to pass a relief bill and provide necessary funding for the USPS! Georgia needs emergency support more than Senator David Perdue needs another vacation. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you, Team Ossoff \-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------- From: Jon Ossoff To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Date: August 16, 2020 Subject: Seriously?!? Hi friend, Millions of Americans have gotten sick, lost their jobs, or face eviction, foreclosure, or bankruptcy as a result of the uncontrolled, uncontained COVID-19 pandemic. More than 160,00 Americans have lost their lives. This is the worst public health crisis in a century. Nevertheless, Mitch McConnell has sent the Senate home for summer holidays. They are on recess until September 8! My opponent, David Perdue, is free to lounge on his private island while COVID-19 spreads among the people unabated. "" Friend, I guess I'm not surprised. The response to the pandemic from the Republicans leading our government has been a catastrophic failure. "" | "" Friend, it's not just Donald Trump. Instead of confronting this emergency with the honesty and seriousness necessary to protect American lives, David Perdue has mindlessly parroted the President's endless denials and misinformation -- all while lining his own pockets. Other countries have largely contained the virus. While Senator Perdue and the GOP told us not to worry about it, they let it spread like wildfire and kill Americans at a massive scale. The U.S. House of Representatives passed a coronavirus relief bill THREE MONTHS AGO (!!!), but McConnell, Perdue, and the rest of the Republicans in the Senate refused to put it up for a vote or negotiate in good faith. Now, David Perdue and his Senate colleagues are going home instead of passing a bill to protect the lives and livelihoods of the American people they are sworn to serve. They just gave up. Georgians deserve better. America deserves better. We simply can't afford another six years of David Perdue and Mitch McConnell in power. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for standing with us, Jon | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. [Stand Up For Wisconsin - $5](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pkihujy-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Stand Up For Wisconsin - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pkihujy-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Sadly, we already know what to expect out of the national Democrats. subject: I need you to step up now, Peter

body:
This is a historic moment and all of us must come together to seize on it. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B3_ak_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B3_ak_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter,

From the day I launched my presidential campaign in the middle of a Minnesota blizzard to last night when I gave my speech to the Democratic Convention, one thing has always been clear: this is a historic moment and all of us must come together to seize on it.

We need to unite our party and our country and we need to do it not just with our words, but with our actions. [That's why I'm asking you to take action with me today by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now toward electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B3_ak_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.18_B3_ak_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

As I traveled America during the primaries, I met so many people who are tired of the noise and the nonsense in our politics. Democrats, Independents and even moderate Republicans -- they want a leader who will heal this country and then, as Joe Biden says, build back better. That's what Joe's all about.

The proof is in his record: **Joe has dedicated his life not to the politics of division, but to fighting for people just like you and me.**

He fights for the mom who's trying to figure out how to stretch her paycheck to cover the rent. He fights for the dad who's doing everything he can to fill his prescriptions while still having enough left over to provide for his family. He fights for the kid who wants to go to college but doesn't know how to pay for it.

Joe Biden fights for you. So today, as the whole nation watches our Democratic Convention, let's fight for him and for Kamala Harris, a ticket that can beat Donald Trump and win this battle for the soul of this nation.

[Please, if you can afford it right now, chip in $5 to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and bring real leadership back to the White House.
