clean_body: This is a historic moment and all of us must come together to seize on it. | | "" Peter, From the day I launched my presidential campaign in the middle of a Minnesota blizzard to last night when I gave my speech to the Democratic Convention, one thing has always been clear: this is a historic moment and all of us must come together to seize on it. We need to unite our party and our country and we need to do it not just with our words, but with our actions. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" As I traveled America during the primaries, I met so many people who are tired of the noise and the nonsense in our politics. Democrats, Independents and even moderate Republicans -- they want a leader who will heal this country and then, as Joe Biden says, build back better. That's what Joe's all about. The proof is in his record: Joe has dedicated his life not to the politics of division, but to fighting for people just like you and me. He fights for the mom who's trying to figure out how to stretch her paycheck to cover the rent. He fights for the dad who's doing everything he can to fill his prescriptions while still having enough left over to provide for his family. He fights for the kid who wants to go to college but doesn't know how to pay for it. Joe Biden fights for you. So today, as the whole nation watches our Democratic Convention, let's fight for him and for Kamala Harris, a ticket that can beat Donald Trump and win this battle for the soul of this nation. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks so much, Peter. Sincerely, Amy Klobuchar U.S. Senator from Minnesota | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Kathy Manning
subject: On this day →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
This is how we can make history in North Carolina this November:
|
---

| | Today marks 100 years of women having the right to vote. On this day in 1920, the 19th Amendment was ratified and adopted, a historic moment for voting rights, our democracy, our country, and equality. **But here 's the hard truth: We still have a long way to go on the road to equality.** North Carolina's 6th Congressional District has NEVER had a woman representative -- I will be the first. And, out of the 333 people to represent North Carolina in the US House of Representatives throughout our history, only SIX have been women. Election Day is fast-approaching, and there is so much at stake: women's rights, voting rights, reproductive freedom, health care -- it's all on the line. **We need leaders who understand their constituents and what they need from our government.** [_**If you can, chip in to our campaign today and help make history in NC-06 ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d283/3d199a51/2facf259/7364b5cf/1556796604/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgxOCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200818?refcode=kme200818_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d283/3d199a51/2facf259/7364b5cc/1556796604/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgxOCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200818?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=kme200818_m_&refcode2=17426")

I've dedicated 30 years of my life to making the Triad a better place. As a community leader, I have worked to strengthen education and economic opportunities and to ensure the health and well-being of our communities.
And now, I'm in this race to protect the rights of ALL North Carolinians as the next -- and first -- congresswoman for North Carolina's 6th District.
[_**This campaign is about North Carolinians. That 's why I'm not accepting any corporate PAC money. The only way we can make history in North Carolina this November is by working together. So if you are able, please contribute to our people-powered campaign today.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d283/3d199a51/2facf259/7364b5cf/1556796604/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgxOCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200818?refcode=kme200818_m_other&refcode2=17426")
Thank you,
Kathy

name: Dr. William Figlesthaler
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by William Figlesthaler for Congress
body:
Congratulations to Byron Donalds for his victory tonight.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qf2Yz6kkpoSTOzFIOXf4-LCOQz4qrPGPKnx-ZtKdALdCOaCN3oVUIsCjaznSxJnZs9kqPeAiOqyCDDqDKgPzoY1vgvQTXKotbXm9uQ5bB8_BrZT1yUbRbrx8Zpbok3jSbrjhrQBN9yBxKz_2lIhC7j5nxWjoDJ1Ipcu0Z1ewFO8=&c=E6DXA8b8yLf83C9UFNx01HWhoeXr_QO5Grf421ulcT-t4FG3nGaR5w==&ch=Ynv1stDcVgPpjMJU_V3P95MoMVdIVtqCca4LUG18UIazfUjNyzpSgg==)
---
|
---
| Peter, thank you. I just called and spoke with Byron Donalds. His supporters and campaign team also deserve congratulations. I wish all of them well, but particularly Byron, Erika and their boys. This is a time of great challenges for America, and I pray he will be successful in championing the conservative initiatives we so desperately need. I want to thank Ashley Wilt and the incredible staff at Encore Urology. You all are the absolute best in the business. Thank you for working so hard every day and allowing me to do what I love to do in the world of medicine. I want to thank my wife Olga, and my three amazing children, Billy, Christine and Elizabeth for standing by me and giving me the strength and resilience to take on this new and unpredictable challenge. I want to thank Travis Reynolds, for the incredible campaign team he led. Together, we traveled to all four corners of District 19 and helped promote a number of conservative policies that will leave our nation better off. You all made an extraordinary effort, not just for me, but for our country. And to the hundreds of donors, volunteers and people across the district who stepped up to help, I say thank you. Thank you for the hundreds of thousands of calls made, tens of thousands of doors knocked, for the financial resources contributed and for the prayers. We left no stone unturned, and everything out on the field. Each and every one of you performed phenomenally. The country, as you know, is at a critical point. There is no time for intra-party fighting or petty politics. We have a President to re-elect, and a House of Representatives to take back. We are in a fight for the life of our nation, and failing to succeed in November could cost us everything. While my disappointment is evident, my hope and belief in our country and desire to serve others burns brighter than ever before. Tonight, God has closed a chapter, but with the closing of every chapter comes a new beginning. Tonight, I urge all of us to unite as one Republican Party. Unite as one party ready, willing, and able to defeat a radicalized Democrat Party hell-bent on driving us into socialism. Unite as one party prepared to fight for the values and fundamentals that have made America the most powerful nation on earth for centuries. Unite as one party rooted in American Exceptionalism. Thank you again, I appreciate each and every one of you more than you know. God Bless you and God Bless America.
---
|
Sincerely,
Dr. William Figlesthaler Your Candidate for US Congress
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Paid for by William Figlesthaler for Congress
---
| | Dr. Fig for Congress | 11216 North Tamiami Trail , Suite 542 , Naples, FL 34110
---

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Ted Cruz: "If we lose texas..."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Let's look at Sen. Cornyn's "contributions.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e39/7f51f7bc/43297669/4ef7e98f/1028809137/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [WIN TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e39/7f51f7bc/43297669/4ef7e98d/1028809137/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200818.3nd__1933__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

Recently Ted Cruz said that "if [Republicans] lose Texas, we'll lose all the ground we've gained." What ground is that, exactly? Let's take a look at Sen. Cornyn's "contributions":
1. He voted 20 times to gut or repeal the Affordable Care Act.
2. He downplayed COVID-19 and called expanded unemployment insurance for out-of-work Texans "a mistake."
3. He repeatedly voted against bipartisan immigration reform.
4. He weakened drug pricing legislation after receiving donations from pharmaceutical company PACs.

If this is the kind of ground we'll lose by kicking Sen. Cornyn out of the Senate, then sign us up!

It's time that Texas had a senator who will fight for ALL of us -- not just those represented by corporate PACs. **[Pitch in to help MJ defeat Senator Cornyn.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e39/7f51f7bc/43297669/4ef7e98d/1028809137/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200818.3nd__1933__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e39/7f51f7bc/43297669/4ef7e98d/1028809137/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200818.3nd__1933__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e39/7f51f7bc/43297669/4ef7e983/1028809137/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1933&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e39/7f51f7bc/43297669/4ef7e981/1028809137/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

subject: Tune In For The Final Debate And See Why We're Sticking With Ed!
body:
We're Supporting Senator Ed Markey's Re-election Bid Because The GND Can't Wait! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d1c2579cfa&e=66979298f9)
---
| | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8f1a5bb7d7&e=66979298f9)
---
Tune in now! Starts at 7pm EST!
|
## **WATCH THE LAST DEBATE!**
---
|
---
| The final debate of the primary is starting soon. Will you tune in to watch and help us support Ed? **[The debate starts at 7pm EST!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e3bb8981b6&e=66979298f9)**

The GND can't wait and Ed has made sure to listen to the youth who will feel the impact of legislative decisions we make today. On the other hand, Joe Kennedy III owns as much as $1.75 million worth of stock in the fossil fuel industry with Chevron, ExxonMobil, Schlumberger, and has received well over 50k from the oil and gas industry.

No wonder he wants to take out the co-author of the GND and doesn't have a better response as to why he's challenging one of the most important progressive voices in the Senate.

We endorsed Senator Markey because he fights to uphold Tribal Treaty Rights. He's been there for indigenous communities when others have remained silent; from DAPL to the current attempt by Trump to disestablish the Mashpee Wampanoag reservation. Ed is there.

Be there for him tonight as he takes the stage for the last debate!
---
|
---
| [GIVE $7 #STICKINGWITHED](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ebaae8cb66&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7 #STICKINGWITHED")
---
|
Thank you,

FUTUREGENS TEAM
#FORTHEFUTURE

---
|

August 18, 2020 6.2.6
---
**Media Contact:**[Matt Langston](mailto:press@neeseforcongress.com)
---
|

|
# **PRO-TRUMP CONSERVATIVE TERRY NEESE DOMINATES RUNOFF DEBATE **

_Never-Trump Career Politician Stephanie Bice Has No Answers For Her Record Of Lying To Voters & Raising Taxes On Oklahomans_ 6.2.6
---
|
---
| **Oklahoma City --** Following Terry Neese’s dominant victory in Tuesday’s runoff election debate, campaign spokesman Matt Langston released the following statement:

_“Tonight’s debate provided voters with yet another clear contrast between Terry Neese, a pro-Trump conservative job creator, and Stephanie Bice, a Never-Trump tax-and-spend career politician who has lied about her record ever chance she got on the campaign trail. After yet another decisive debate victory, Terry Neese remains the clear choice for conservatives who want lower taxes, a booming economy, and our Constitutional freedoms protected at all costs.”_

For more information on Terry Neese or her campaign, please visit [NeeseForCongress.com](https://neeseforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67e5d68847a7afd74267bf651&id=c48e71e338&e=0604daec3e).
